flavor: 宁可千日不震，不可一日不防

zh.name: 地震避险姿势
zh.q: 地震时最安全的姿势？
zh.exp: 国际通用：Drop(伏地) Cover(遮挡) Hold On(手抓牢)
tips: 🚫 绝对不跳楼——致死率远高于地震
zh.scenario: 客厅看电视吊灯摇摆挂画掉落——地震来了！

en.name: Earthquake Pose
en.exp: Drop to ground take Cover Hold On.
en.scenario: Watching TV as chandelier swings — earthquake!

flavor: 小震不用跑大震跑不了

zh.name: 室内避险位置
zh.q: 地震时躲在哪？
zh.exp: 桌下或墙角形成生命三角最安全
tips: ✅ 一手抓桌腿一手护后颈
zh.scenario: 卧室看书地面抖动书架掉落——快找安全角落！

en.name: Safe Spot
en.exp: Triangle of life under furniture
en.scenario: Reading as ground shakes. Books fall!

zh.name: 震后撤离
zh.q: 主震停止后怎么做？
zh.exp: 走楼梯关燃气电源防火灾
zh.scenario: 主震停了！从桌下站起准备撤离！

en.name: Post-Quake
en.exp: Use stairs. Turn off gas/power.

zh.name: 震级与烈度
zh.q: 关于震级和烈度正确说法？
opts: 一个地震一个震级各地烈度不同
zh.exp: 震级=能量(唯一) 烈度=破坏(因地而异)
zh.voice: 震级量能量烈度看破坏！
zh.scenario: 老师问A城轻晃B城倒塌的原因——你知道答案！

en.name: Mag vs Int
en.exp: Mag=energy Int=local damage

zh.name: 地震预警
zh.q: 预警系统能做什么？
zh.exp: 利用P波(快)S波(慢)速差抢逃生时间
zh.scenario: 手机尖叫：地震波15秒到！倒计时——时间就是生命！

en.name: Early Warning
en.exp: Detects P-waves warns before S-waves.

zh.name: 暴雨预警
zh.q: 暴雨预警最高级别？
zh.exp: 蓝黄橙红四级红色3小时100mm+
zh.scenario: 放学收到红警——3小时降雨120mm！

en.name: Rainstorm Warning
en.exp: Blue/Yellow/Orange/Red. Red=100mm+ in 3h.

zh.name: 洪水逃生方向
zh.q: 洪水来了往哪跑？
zh.exp: 向高处转移！不游泳不开车涉水！
zh.scenario: 暴雨淹没小区小车泡水——快决定往哪跑！

en.name: Flood Escape
en.exp: Go HIGH! Never swim or drive.

zh.name: 洪水受困
zh.q: 被困建筑物内怎么办？
zh.exp: 到屋顶用鲜艳衣物或手电筒发信号
tips: ✅ 鲜艳衣物或手电筒发信号
zh.scenario: 水涨到二楼！被困屋顶救援队没看到你。

en.name: Flood Survival
en.exp: Rooftop wave bright clothes or flashlight.
en.scenario: Water at 2nd floor! Rescue passes by.

zh.name: 雨天行车
zh.q: 遇积水路段怎么做？
zh.exp: 15cm打滑30cm浮车60cm冲走SUV绕道
zh.scenario: 回家遇大积水潭——有的冲有的掉头你犹豫。

en.name: Rain Driving
en.exp: 15cm slip 30cm float 60cm sweep detour!

zh.name: 城市内涝
zh.q: 暴雨内涝最危险做法？
zh.exp: 地下空间可能瞬间被淹！北京721暴雨案例。
zh.scenario: 红警24小时250mm！地下车库的车怎么办？

en.name: Urban Flood
en.exp: Underground floods in minutes.

zh.name: 台风前准备
zh.q: 台风前正确做法？
zh.exp: 加固门窗收阳台清排水12级风翻车！
zh.scenario: 台风山猫14级24小时登陆——全家行动！

en.name: Typhoon Prep
en.exp: Secure windows bring items clear drains Cat 12 flips cars!

zh.name: 台风天室内
zh.q: 台风登陆时怎么做？
zh.exp: 远离窗+电池灯代替蜡烛
zh.voice: 内侧远离窗电池灯安全！
zh.scenario: 台风呼啸东西乱飞——别出门！

en.name: Typhoon Indoor
en.exp: Stay away windows use battery lights.

zh.name: 台风预警等级
zh.q: 台风预警从低到高？
zh.exp: 蓝(准备)黄(警戒)橙(严重)红(最高级)
zh.scenario: 手机收到预警升级蓝→黄→橙！

en.name: Warning Levels
en.exp: Blue=Prep Yellow=Alert Orange=Severe Red=Extreme

zh.name: 台风过后
zh.q: 台风过后最重要？
zh.exp: 电线掉落易触电积水有细菌泡水食物不能吃
zh.scenario: 台风过了！出门前先检查安全。

en.name: After Typhoon
en.exp: Downed lines floodwater bacteria contaminated food.

zh.name: 台风眼
zh.q: 关于台风眼正确说法？
zh.exp: 台风眼低压区暂时平静随后眼壁更强风雨
zh.scenario: 狂风暴雨突然停下！朋友说台风走了——你皱眉！

en.name: Typhoon Eye
en.exp: Eye calm low-pressure eye wall stronger winds.

zh.name: 滑坡前兆
zh.q: 滑坡前通常不出现？
zh.exp: 裂缝+树歪+轰鸣=前兆彩虹无关
zh.scenario: 三天大雨后山坡裂缝大树歪——不对劲！

en.name: Landslide Signs
en.exp: Cracks+tilting+rumbling=signs rainbow normal

zh.name: 滑坡逃生
zh.q: 滑坡该往哪跑？
zh.exp: 向两侧高处以避开滑坡路径
zh.scenario: 山上轰隆隆巨响泥石如瀑布向村子冲来！

en.name: Landslide Escape
en.exp: Perpendicular to slide+uphill.

zh.name: 滑坡预防
zh.q: 哪项减少滑坡风险？
zh.exp: 植被根系固土破坏植被增加风险
tips: ⚠️ 破坏植被加剧水土流失
zh.scenario: 后山树林被砍村民议论——你知道后果。

en.name: Prevention
en.exp: Tree roots bind soil deforestation increases risk.

zh.name: 泥石流逃生
zh.q: 泥石流来时怎么逃？
zh.exp: 泥石流沿沟道倾泻8-15m/s
zh.scenario: 山谷中传来如火车般的轰鸣越来越响！

en.name: Debris Flow
en.exp: Debris flows 8-15 m/s sides uphill safe.

zh.name: 滑坡地形
zh.q: 哪种地形易滑坡？
zh.exp: 陡坡+植被少+雨水=滑坡三要素
zh.voice: 陡坡少植被雨水多三要素！
zh.scenario: 新村选址山脚下风景好——你看了看陡坡。

en.name: Slide Terrain
en.exp: Steep+sparse+rain=landslide trifecta

zh.name: 火灾逃生姿势
zh.q: 火灾现场正确的逃生姿势是？
opts: 匍匐前进用湿毛巾捂口鼻
zh.exp: 浓烟向上飘，贴近地面空气含氧量更高。跳楼致死率极高！
zh.voice: 弯腰低姿湿毛巾捂口鼻！
tips: 💡 摸门把手温度判断火势
zh.scenario: 客厅突然浓烟滚滚，门缝渗入黑烟——火灾就发生在门外！

en.name: Fire Escape Pose
opts: Crawl low wet towel over mouth
en.exp: Smoke rises. Air near ground is cleaner. Jumping is deadly!

zh.name: 电器火灾处理
zh.q: 电器着火了首先应该怎么做？
opts: 拔掉电源插头或拉总闸断电
zh.exp: 电器火灾必须先断电！水导电可能触电。用干粉灭火器或沙土。
zh.scenario: 插座冒火花引燃窗帘——手边有水盆和灭火器！

en.name: Electrical Fire
en.exp: Cut power first! Water conducts electricity. Use dry powder extinguisher.

zh.name: 油锅起火处理
zh.q: 油锅起火了正确的做法是？
zh.exp: 盖锅盖隔绝氧气最有效。倒水使热油飞溅火势更大！
zh.scenario: 炸鸡腿油温太高锅里突然蹿起火焰！

en.name: Pan Fire
opts: Cover with lid turn off heat
en.exp: Lid cuts oxygen. Water makes oil splash fire worse!

zh.name: 高层火灾逃生
zh.q: 高层住宅楼下层起火该怎么办？
zh.exp: 火灾时电梯断电困人。走楼梯向下逃。下层烟大则退回堵门等救援。
zh.scenario: 住15层楼下起火必须撤离！

en.name: High-rise Fire
en.exp: Never elevator in fire. Use stairs. Retreat seal door if smoke below.

zh.name: 家庭火灾预防
zh.q: 以下哪种做法能有效预防家庭火灾？
opts: 在卧室给电动车电池充电
定期检查燃气软管和电气线路
同时用多个大功率电器
zh.exp: 电动车电池室内充电是火灾重大隐患！保险丝烧断说明超负荷！
tips: 🔋 电动车电池不入室充电
🪡 保险丝烧断查原因换新
zh.scenario: 社区消防宣传日——检查家里有哪些隐患？

en.name: Home Fire Prevention
en.exp: Indoor e-bike charging is major fire risk! Fuse blowing = overload.

zh.name: 雷电安全
zh.q: 雷暴时最安全的地点？
zh.exp: 室内远离门窗最安全大树引雷山顶暴露水导电
tips: ✅ 室内远离门窗水管电器
🚫 山顶和开阔田野也危险
🚫 水中导电不游泳不淋浴
zh.scenario: 郊外玩天色变暗朋友指大树去躲——你摇头！

en.name: Lightning Safety
en.exp: Indoors away windows safest. Trees attract lightning.

zh.name: 室内避雷
zh.q: 雷暴时室内应避免？
zh.exp: 雷电可能沿水管传导淋浴时容易遭雷击
tips: 🚫 雷暴时不要淋浴泡澡洗碗
📊 每年有人在浴室遭雷击
zh.scenario: 外面电闪雷鸣准备洗澡——还是等雨停吧！

en.name: Indoor Lightning
en.exp: Lightning travels through plumbing showering dangerous.

zh.name: 雷电原理
zh.q: 闪电最喜欢击中什么？
zh.exp: 闪电寻找最短路径高大孤立突出物体最易被击中
zh.voice: 高大孤立物体最易被雷击！
tips: 🚫 空旷地不要打伞当制高点
zh.scenario: 空旷田野上暴风雨来了你打着伞——突然想到雷电知识赶紧放下伞！

en.name: Lightning Goal
en.exp: Lightning seeks shortest path tall isolated objects get hit most.
en.scenario: Open field with umbrella in storm!

zh.name: 雷击急救
zh.q: 有人被雷击后第一时间应？
zh.exp: 雷击后心脏可能停止跳动立刻打120并实施心肺复苏
tips: 💡 雷击后人体不带电可以安全接触
✅ 检查呼吸心跳必要时做CPR
⚠️ 雷击可能造成烧伤和听力损伤
zh.scenario: 朋友在操场上被雷击倒了你冲过去——该怎么做？

en.name: Lightning First Aid
en.exp: Heart may stop. Call emergency and perform CPR immediately.
tips: 💡 Victim not electrified safe to touch

zh.name: 防雷措施
zh.q: 以下哪项防雷措施正确？
zh.exp: 汽车是法拉第笼金属车身可将电流导入地面车内相对安全
tips: 🚗 汽车是法拉第笼关窗相对安全
💡 穿橡胶底鞋有一定绝缘作用
zh.scenario: 郊外自驾游遇到雷暴你坐在车里——该继续开还是下车跑？

en.name: Lightning Safety
en.exp: Car is a Faraday cage metal body conducts current to ground.

zh.name: 暴雪前准备
zh.q: 暴雪前最重要的准备？
zh.exp: 暴雪可能断交通电停供储备3天食物和保暖物资最重要
tips: ✅ 储备至少3天干粮瓶装水
✅ 准备毛毯暖宝宝保暖衣
🚫 不在室内用炭火取暖防中毒
zh.scenario: 预报明晚特大暴雪气温-15℃——全家开始准备！

en.name: Snowstorm Prep
en.exp: Snowstorm may cut transport and power. Stock 3 days of supplies.

zh.name: 雪天行走
zh.q: 结冰路面正确行走方式？
opts: 企鹅步小步慢行重心前倾
zh.exp: 企鹅步最安全：小碎步重心微前倾双脚外八字防滑
zh.voice: 企鹅步小步慢行不滑倒！
tips: 🐧 企鹅步=小步+重心前倾+外八字
🚫 手插口袋走路摔倒无法平衡
💡 老人雪天拄拐杖或不出门
zh.scenario: 暴雪后大门台阶结了厚冰——怎么下脚？

en.name: Snow Walking
en.exp: Penguin walk safest: small shuffling steps body forward.

zh.name: 冻伤处理
zh.q: 冻伤后正确处理方法？
zh.exp: 冻伤后应用40-42℃温水慢慢复温热水雪搓火烤都会加重损伤
tips: 🚫 不用雪搓摩擦力加重损伤
🚫 不用火烤感觉迟钝易烧伤
zh.scenario: 滑雪时朋友手指冻得发白没有知觉——你该怎么做？

en.name: Frostbite Treatment
en.exp: Use 40-42℃ warm water. Hot water snow rubbing and fire worsen injury.

zh.name: 暴雪被困车内
zh.q: 暴雪中被困车内怎么做？
opts: 开暖气间歇取暖排气管清雪
zh.exp: 间歇开暖气防一氧化碳中毒10分钟开/10分钟关保持排气管畅通
zh.voice: 间歇开暖气清排气管防中毒！
tips: ✅ 间歇开暖气10分钟开10分钟关
✅ 清排气管周围积雪防废气倒灌
✅ 用鲜艳衣物在车外做标记
💡 保持可见做至少能活动手脚
zh.scenario: 自驾游遇暴风雪车陷雪中手机信号弱——如何在车内安全过夜？

en.name: Trapped in Car
en.exp: Intermittent heat prevent CO poisoning. Keep exhaust pipe clear of snow.

zh.name: 失温自救
zh.q: 出现失温症状应怎么做？
opts: 换干衣裹保温毯喝温水
zh.exp: 失温死亡率高！换干衣保温喝温水。喝酒让血管扩张反而加速失温。
zh.voice: 换干衣裹保温毯喝温水！
tips: ✅ 换掉湿衣服裹保温毯或睡袋
✅ 喝温水补充能量不要喝咖啡
🚫 喝酒让血管扩张加速失温
🚫 剧烈运动增加热量流失
zh.scenario: 爬山遇暴风雪浑身湿透开始发抖意识模糊——这是失温了！

en.name: Hypothermia
en.exp: Hypothermia deadly! Dry clothes blanket warm drink. Alcohol worsens.

zh.name: 龙卷风前兆
zh.q: 龙卷风来临前天空可能出现什么颜色？
zh.exp: 龙卷风来临前天空常呈现诡异的暗绿色/黄绿色，由风暴云折射光线造成。
zh.voice: 暗绿色天空是龙卷风预警！
zh.scenario: 野外写生天色突然暗绿云开始旋转...

en.name: Tornado Warning Signs
en.exp: Tornado sky turns eerie green/yellow-green.

zh.name: 室内龙卷风避险
zh.q: 龙卷风来袭在室内应躲哪里？
opts: 地下室或一楼中央无窗房间
zh.exp: 龙卷风可掀翻屋顶！地下室最安全。没地下室则躲一楼中央浴室或走廊。
tips: 🚪 没地下室躲一楼中央浴室
zh.scenario: 龙卷风警报响了！风越来越大声音像火车...

en.name: Indoor Tornado Safety
en.q: Where to hide indoors during tornado?
en.exp: Tornado can rip off roof! Basement safest. Interior room if no basement.

zh.name: 户外龙卷风逃生
zh.q: 户外遇到龙卷风该怎么办？
opts: 找低洼或沟渠趴下护头
zh.exp: 龙卷风时速200-400km/h跑不过！低洼趴下双手护头是最佳选择。
zh.scenario: 乡间公路漏斗云远处着地碎屑漫天飞舞！

en.name: Outdoor Tornado Escape
en.exp: Tornado 200-400km/h! Can't outrun. Lie low cover head.

zh.name: 车内龙卷风避险
zh.q: 开车遇到龙卷风最佳做法？
zh.exp: 汽车被龙卷风卷起抛掷！弃车找低洼比待在车里安全得多。
tips: 💡 来不及就系安全带趴座椅下
zh.scenario: 高速路前方巨型龙卷风横扫！

en.name: Car Tornado Escape
en.exp: Car can be tossed! Abandon and lie low.

zh.name: 龙卷风灾后安全
zh.q: 龙卷风过后首先应注意什么？
opts: 避开倒塌电线泄漏燃气等危险
zh.exp: 龙卷风后断电线漏燃气等次生灾害多。小心绕开等专业救援。
zh.voice: 避电线燃气管防次生灾害！
zh.scenario: 龙卷风过后面临满目疮痍...

en.name: Post-Tornado Safety
en.exp: Tornado leaves many hazards. Avoid and wait for pros.

zh.name: 燃气泄漏识别
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏最可靠的方法是？
opts: 闻到类似臭鸡蛋的异味
zh.exp: 燃气公司加入臭味剂(硫醇)，泄漏时会有臭鸡蛋味！
zh.voice: 臭鸡蛋味就是燃气泄漏！
zh.scenario: 晚上回家一开门厨房飘来臭鸡蛋味——家里可能燃气漏了！

en.name: Gas Leak Detection
en.exp: Gas companies add mercaptan for that smell!

zh.name: 燃气泄漏紧急处理
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏第一步应该做什么？
opts: 关闭燃气总阀开窗通风不碰电器
zh.exp: 任何电火花都可能引爆泄漏燃气！关阀开窗后到室外打电话。
zh.scenario: 确定燃气泄漏了——厨房里味越来越浓！

en.name: Gas Leak Emergency
opts: Close valve open windows no sparks
en.exp: Any spark can ignite gas! Close valve ventilate call outside.

zh.name: 燃气中毒急救
zh.q: 发现有人燃气中毒应首先？
opts: 开窗通风把人移到空气新鲜处
zh.exp: 燃气中毒主要是一氧化碳中毒。先切断毒源再施救，自己也注意防护。
zh.voice: 先通风后救人注意防护！
tips: 🏃 把人移到室外空气流通处
🚑 无呼吸心跳立即心肺复苏
😷 施救者用湿毛巾捂口鼻
zh.scenario: 发现家人倒在厨房地上满屋燃气味！

en.name: Gas Poisoning First Aid
en.q: First step for gas poisoning victim?
en.exp: CO poisoning. Cut source first then rescue. Protect yourself.

zh.name: 燃气管道自查
zh.q: 如何安全地检查燃气管道是否漏气？
zh.exp: 肥皂水最安全有效。冒泡说明漏气了！
zh.scenario: 听到燃气表附近嘶嘶声想检查...

en.name: Gas Leak Check
en.q: How to safely check gas pipe for leaks?
en.exp: Soap water is safest. Bubbles mean leak!

zh.name: 安全用气习惯
zh.q: 以下哪个是安全用气的正确习惯？
opts: 用完关闭灶具和燃气总阀门
zh.exp: 用完关灶具和总阀门是根本保障。睡觉不关燃气极度危险！
tips: ⏰ 出门前检查燃气关了没
zh.scenario: 准备睡觉了——回想今天用完燃气关了阀门吗？

en.name: Safe Gas Habits
en.q: Which is a safe gas habit?
opts: Close stove and valve after use
en.exp: Close both stove and valve after use. Leaving gas on is deadly!
en.scenario: Bedtime — did you close the gas valve?

zh.name: 电梯坠落保护姿势
zh.q: 电梯失控下坠时正确的保护姿势是？
opts: 背靠墙壁膝盖弯曲双手抱头
zh.exp: 背靠墙膝盖弯曲缓冲冲击力保护脊椎。跳起来反而更危险！
tips: 💡 按所有楼层键可能让电梯停在最近层
zh.scenario: 电梯突然剧烈抖动然后急速下坠！

en.name: Elevator Fall Safety
opts: Back to wall knees bent head down
en.exp: Back to wall knees bent absorb impact. Don't jump!
tips: 💡 Press all buttons it may stop

zh.name: 电梯被困应对
zh.q: 电梯突然停在半空被困怎么办？
opts: 按警铃用对讲求救耐心等救援
用钥匙撬天花板爬出去
zh.exp: 电梯有安全钳制动不会自由落体。强行扒门可能坠落井道！
zh.scenario: 电梯运行到8楼突然停住不动了...

en.name: Stuck in Elevator
en.q: Stuck in elevator what to do?
en.exp: Elevator has safety brakes. Forcing doors may cause fall.

zh.name: 电梯门故障处理
zh.q: 电梯门打不开怎么办？
opts: 多次按开门键后按警铃求救
zh.exp: 先按开门键几次(门可能卡住)。不行就按警铃等专业救援。
zh.voice: 按开门键不行就按警铃！
zh.scenario: 电梯停住门一丝缝都不开，按键也没反应...

en.name: Elevator Door Stuck
opts: Press open several times then alarm
en.exp: Try open button several times. If stuck press alarm.

zh.name: 电梯超载处理
zh.q: 电梯发出超载警报应该怎么做？
opts: 最后上的人先退出等待下一趟
zh.exp: 超载警报说明已超重，强行使用可能导致电梯故障或坠落。
tips: ⚠️ 超载可能引发电梯故障
zh.scenario: 早高峰电梯里已经站满了人，你最后挤进去警报响了...

en.name: Elevator Overload
en.q: Elevator overload alarm what to do?
en.exp: Overload alarm means overweight. Forcing may cause elevator failure.

zh.name: 扶梯紧急情况
zh.q: 自动扶梯上有人摔倒应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 扶梯红色急停按钮在两端和中部。按下即停能避免更多人受伤。
tips: 🔴 红色急停按钮两端和中部都有
✅ 扶梯停稳后再救助摔倒的人
zh.scenario: 商场扶梯上前面的人没站稳连滚带摔下来！

en.name: Escalator Emergency
en.exp: Red emergency stop at ends and middle. Stop escalator immediately.

flavor: 宁可千日不震不可一日不备

zh.name: 安全头盔
zh.desc: 坚固耐冲击的安全头盔
zh.effect: 地震火山喷发时防落石防砸伤
zh.usage: 地震发生时立即戴上保护头部
tips: 💡 放在门口方便取到的地方
🚫 有裂痕凹陷应立即更换
zh.scenario: 地震发生时你抓起门口的安全帽戴好——一块天花板砸落但头盔保护了你！

en.name: Safety Helmet
en.effect: Protects from falling rocks during earthquake/volcanic eruption.
en.usage: Wear immediately during earthquake to protect head.
en.scenario: Ceiling falls on you but the helmet saves you!

flavor: 小小口罩作用大防火防灾全靠它

zh.name: 防护口罩
zh.desc: N95级别高效防护口罩
zh.effect: 防火山灰浓烟雾霾和传染病飞沫
zh.usage: 灾害时戴好贴合面部鼻梁处压紧
tips: 🚫 不要重复使用一次性口罩
zh.scenario: 火山喷发后天空下起灰白色的火山灰你赶紧戴上N95口罩保护呼吸！

en.name: Protective Mask
en.effect: Blocks ash smoke smog and droplets.
en.usage: Wear fitted tightly over nose during disaster.
en.scenario: Volcanic ash falling! You put on N95 mask.

zh.name: 护目镜
zh.desc: 密封防沙护目镜
zh.effect: 防火山灰沙尘暴碎片飞溅
zh.usage: 灾害外出时佩戴贴合眼部
tips: ✅ 选择密封性好的护目镜
💊 随身带眼药水冲洗异物
zh.scenario: 沙尘暴来了空气质量爆表你戴上护目镜眼睛安然无恙！

en.name: Goggles
en.effect: Protects eyes from ash dust and debris.
en.usage: Wear tightly over eyes during disaster.
en.scenario: Sandstorm hits but your eyes are safe!

zh.name: 防护手套
zh.desc: 耐磨防滑防护手套
zh.effect: 清理废墟时防割伤防刺穿
zh.usage: 清理废墟搬运瓦砾时佩戴
tips: 🚫 橡胶手套不足以应对废墟
💡 与头盔口罩一起放入应急包
zh.scenario: 地震后你戴上手套清理碎玻璃和破瓦片——手一点都没受伤！

en.name: Work Gloves
en.effect: Protects hands during debris clearing.
en.usage: Wear when handling rubble and debris.
en.scenario: Clearing debris after quake — hands protected!

zh.name: 反光安全背心
zh.desc: 高亮反光安全背心
zh.effect: 夜间或浓烟中让救援人员看到你
zh.usage: 灾害撤离时穿在最外层
tips: 🚫 穿在厚衣服外面不影响反光
💡 配合手电筒使用效果更好
zh.scenario: 深夜地震后停电一片漆黑你穿着反光背心救援队很远就看到了你！

en.name: Safety Vest
en.effect: Makes you visible to rescuers at night or in smoke.
en.usage: Wear over outer layer during evacuation.
en.scenario: Dark after quake — vest makes you visible!

zh.name: 应急逃生绳
zh.desc: 承重300kg以上的应急逃生绳
zh.effect: 火灾或地震时从低楼层应急逃生
zh.usage: 固定在牢固处顺绳下降到地面
tips: 🔁 使用后需更换不可复用
zh.scenario: 楼道被大火封住你迅速将逃生绳固定在暖气片上大家依次滑下——安全了！

en.name: Escape Rope
en.effect: Emergency escape from low floors during fire/quake.
en.usage: Secure to sturdy anchor descend carefully.
en.scenario: Stairs blocked by fire! Escape rope saves everyone!

zh.name: 应急哨子
zh.desc: 高音应急求救哨子
zh.effect: 被困时发声音信号让救援人员定位
zh.usage: 吹三短三长再三短(SOS)反复
tips: ✅ 三短三长三短=SOS国际求救
💡 声音比喊叫传得更远更省力
🔁 金属哨子耐用塑料应急
🎒 挂在应急包外面随时取用
zh.scenario: 被困在废墟下手机没信号你吹响了哨子——救援队听到声音朝你挖来！

en.name: Emergency Whistle
en.effect: Signals rescuers to your location when trapped.
en.usage: Blow 3 short 3 long 3 short (SOS) repeatedly.
en.scenario: Trapped under rubble — whistle guides rescuers to you!

zh.name: 应急保温毯
zh.desc: 铝箔应急保温毯
zh.effect: 失温时包裹身体保温雨天可防雨
zh.usage: 打开完全包裹身体铝面向内反射体温
zh.scenario: 暴雪中你浑身湿透开始发抖你迅速裹上保温毯体温保住了！

en.name: Emergency Blanket
en.effect: Prevents hypothermia by trapping body heat.
en.usage: Wrap fully around body foil side inward.
en.scenario: Shivering in blizzard — blanket saves your life!

zh.name: 急救包
zh.desc: 家庭急救包含基本医疗用品
zh.effect: 灾害受伤时消毒包扎止血固定
zh.usage: 取出物品按说明使用注意无菌操作
tips: ✅ 包含：创口贴纱布绷带胶带
✅ 包含：碘伏棉签一次性手套
💊 备常用药：止泻药退烧药
🔁 每6个月检查药品是否过期
zh.scenario: 余震中你的手臂被碎玻璃划伤你迅速从急救包中取出碘伏和纱布包扎好！

en.name: First Aid Kit
en.desc: Home first aid kit with basic medical supplies.
en.effect: Cleans disinfects bandages and stabilizes injuries.
en.usage: Use supplies following instructions maintain sterile.
en.scenario: Cut by broken glass — first aid kit saves the day!

zh.name: 应急收音机
zh.desc: 手摇发电应急收音机
zh.effect: 灾害断网断电时收听官方应急广播
zh.usage: 摇动把手发电调频到应急广播频率
tips: 📡 了解本地应急广播频率
🔋 部分型号可给手机充电
zh.scenario: 地震后全城断电断网手机没信号你用应急收音机听到了政府的救援通知！

en.name: Emergency Radio
en.effect: Receives official emergency broadcasts when power/internet is down.
en.usage: Crank to generate power tune to emergency frequency.
en.scenario: Power and internet down — radio brings news!

zh.name: 对讲机
zh.desc: 民用对讲机短距离通讯
zh.effect: 手机网络中断时和家人联络
zh.usage: 调到同一频道按PTT通话
tips: 🔋 备好备用电池或充电宝
zh.scenario: 手机信号塔在地震中倒塌你用对讲机和在不同地点的爸妈联系上了！

en.name: Walkie Talkie
en.effect: Communicate with family when phone network is down.
en.usage: Set same channel press PTT to talk.
en.scenario: Cell towers down — walkie connects family!

zh.name: 荧光棒
zh.desc: 化学发光荧光棒
zh.effect: 黑暗中提供无火照明和定位标志
zh.usage: 弯折后摇晃发光可持续6-12小时
tips: 🚫 不可剪断内部液体无毒但刺激
🎨 不同颜色可标记不同区域
zh.scenario: 地震后天然气泄漏不能使用明火你折断荧光棒黑暗中出现蓝色光芒！

en.name: Light Stick
en.effect: Provides flameless illumination and location marking.
en.usage: Bend to activate lasts 6-12 hours.
en.scenario: Gas leak no candles — light stick glows!

zh.name: 应急饮用水
zh.desc: 瓶装或桶装应急饮用水
zh.effect: 灾害中断水时补充水分维持生存
zh.usage: 每人每天至少3升节约使用
tips: 💧 每人每天至少3升饮用水
✅ 家庭应储备3天以上用水
🚫 泡水或包装破损的不要喝
💊 备净水片可净化野外水源
zh.scenario: 供水管道在地震中断裂你靠着储备的瓶装水挺过了最困难的三天！

en.name: Emergency Water
en.effect: Hydration when water supply is cut off.
en.usage: 3L per person per day ration carefully.
en.scenario: Water pipes broken — stored water saves you!

zh.name: 应急食品
zh.desc: 高能量耐储存应急食品
zh.effect: 灾害断供时提供能量和营养
zh.usage: 按需取用优先吃易变质食品
tips: ✅ 压缩饼干高能量耐保存
✅ 巧克力能量棒快速补能
zh.scenario: 超市货架空空如也但你家的应急食品箱里有压缩饼干和罐头——饿不着！

en.name: Emergency Food
en.effect: Provides energy and nutrition when food supply is disrupted.
en.usage: Ration and eat perishable items first.
en.scenario: Store shelves empty but your emergency food box is full!

zh.name: 多功能工具钳
zh.desc: 含钳子刀锯螺丝刀等多种工具
zh.effect: 清理障碍切断绳索拧螺丝等应急用途
zh.usage: 根据需求选择合适工具头使用
tips: 💡 放在应急包外层快速取用
zh.scenario: 家门被倒塌的柜子堵住了你拿出多功能工具钳锯断木板顺利逃出！

en.name: Multi-tool
en.effect: Cutting prying screwing for emergency use.
en.usage: Select appropriate tool for the task.
en.scenario: Door blocked by fallen cabinet — multi-tool cuts you free!

zh.name: 强光手电筒
zh.desc: LED强光手电筒防水防震
zh.effect: 黑暗中照明发求救信号
zh.usage: 按需开启注意节约电池
tips: 💡 装好备用电池分开存放
🚫 不用时反装电池防漏电
zh.scenario: 地震后天黑了家里一片漆黑——你打开手电筒照亮了整个房间！

en.name: Flashlight
en.effect: Illumination and emergency signaling in dark.
en.usage: Use as needed conserve battery.
en.scenario: Power out after quake — flashlight saves the day!

zh.name: 指南针
zh.desc: 机械指南针不受电子干扰
zh.effect: 灾害中辨别方向寻找逃生路线
zh.usage: 水平放置待指针稳定后辨别南北
tips: 🧭 机械式不需电池最可靠
✅ 结合地图使用效果更好
💡 记住北方向确定其他方向
zh.scenario: 浓雾中完全迷失方向你拿出指南针找到了往南走的路——是出山的方向！

en.name: Compass
en.effect: Direction finding during disaster.
en.usage: Hold level wait for needle to stabilize.
tips: ✅ Use with map for best results
en.scenario: Lost in thick fog — compass points you home!

zh.name: 安全锤/破窗器
zh.desc: 应急破窗安全锤
zh.effect: 被困车内时打碎玻璃逃生
zh.usage: 用尖头击打车窗四角或边缘
tips: 🚗 放在驾驶座门边易取处
✅ 击打玻璃四角最容易碎
🔨 安全锤比金属棍更有效
💡 拔出尖头保护套后再用
🚫 不要击打中间区域玻璃
zh.scenario: 车辆落水门打不开你用车载安全锤对准车窗四角用力一击——玻璃碎了！

en.name: Life Hammer
en.effect: Shatters car window when trapped.
en.usage: Strike corner/edge of window with pointed tip.
en.scenario: Car submerged — life hammer shatters window!

zh.name: 充电宝/备用电池
zh.desc: 大容量充电宝和各类备用电池
zh.effect: 灾害停电时为手机手电等充电
zh.usage: 提前充满电停电时给设备供电
tips: 💡 手机省电模式极限续航
🔁 每3个月充放电一次保养
zh.scenario: 停电第三天手机即将没电你拿出充满电的充电宝续上了——终于联系上了救援队！

en.name: Power Bank
en.desc: High-capacity power bank and spare batteries.
en.effect: Charges phone and devices when power is out.
en.usage: Pre-charge and use to power devices during outage.
en.scenario: Day 3 without power — power bank saves your phone!

zh.name: 防尘面罩
zh.desc: 可更换滤棉的防尘面罩
zh.effect: 重建清理时防粉尘木屑等颗粒
zh.usage: 戴好贴合面部及时更换滤棉
tips: 🚫 滤棉变色或异味立即换
🔁 面罩可用湿布擦拭清洁
zh.scenario: 灾后清理废墟尘土飞扬你戴着防尘面罩轻松呼吸——别人被呛得直咳嗽！

en.name: Dust Mask
en.effect: Protects from dust particles during cleanup.
en.usage: Wear fitted replace filter when dirty.
en.scenario: Dust everywhere during cleanup — mask saves your lungs!

flavor: 地震时保护头部最重要

zh.name: 地震躲在桌下
zh.q: 地震时在室内应该？
zh.exp: 躲在坚固家具下可以防止被掉落物砸伤，这是国际通用的避震方法。

en.name: Hide Under Table
en.exp: Hiding under sturdy furniture protects from falling debris.

zh.name: 地震预警原理
zh.q: 地震预警利用了什么原理？
zh.exp: 电磁波速度约30万公里/秒，远快于地震波的几公里/秒，可以抢出几秒到几十秒的预警时间。

en.name: Early Warning
en.q: How does earthquake early warning work?
opts: Radio waves faster than seismic waves
en.exp: Radio waves travel much faster than seismic waves, buying precious seconds of warning.

zh.name: 烟雾逃生
zh.q: 火灾逃生时为什么要弯腰？
opts: 烟雾向上升，下方空气好
zh.exp: 热烟和有毒气体因密度小而上升，地面附近空气相对清洁，弯腰可减少吸入有毒烟雾。

en.name: Smoke Escape
en.exp: Hot smoke and toxic gases rise, so cleaner air is near the floor.

flavor: 灭火器使用口诀：提拔握压

zh.name: 灭火器使用
zh.q: 灭火器使用的正确顺序是？
zh.exp: 拔出保险销→提起灭火器→握住喷管→压下把手，简称'提拔握压'。

en.name: Fire Extinguisher
en.exp: Pull pin → Lift extinguisher → Grip hose → Press handle.

zh.name: 洪水避险
zh.q: 遇到洪水应该？
zh.exp: 洪水来临时应立即向高处转移，不要试图穿越积水区域，水深未知非常危险。

en.name: Flood Escape
en.exp: Always move to higher ground during floods. Never try to cross flooded areas.

zh.name: 内涝安全
zh.q: 城市内涝时最危险的是？
zh.exp: 暴雨时下水道井盖可能被水冲开，形成看不见的陷阱，行人可能跌入。

en.name: Urban Flooding
en.exp: Storm drains can displace manhole covers, creating invisible hazards.

zh.name: 台风防护
zh.q: 台风来临时应该？
zh.exp: 台风天应待在室内，远离窗户和玻璃，防止被强风吹破的碎片伤到。

en.name: Typhoon Safety
en.exp: Stay indoors, away from windows and glass during typhoons.

flavor: 门窗贴米字胶带防碎裂

zh.name: 台风门窗防护
zh.q: 台风前窗户贴米字胶带的作用是？
zh.exp: 米字胶带可以增加玻璃强度，即使碎裂也不会四处飞散伤人。

en.name: Window Taping
en.exp: Tape adds strength to glass and prevents shards from flying if glass breaks.

zh.name: 室内防雷
zh.q: 雷电时为什么不要洗澡？
zh.exp: 金属水管和接地装置在雷击时可能带电，洗澡有触电风险。

en.name: Indoor Lightning
en.exp: Metal plumbing and grounding can carry electrical charge during lightning.

zh.name: 手机与雷电
zh.q: 关于手机和雷电的说法正确的是？
zh.exp: 手机的无线电波不会吸引雷电，但雷雨天在室外使用手机时人可能成为最高点而被雷击。

en.name: Phone & Lightning
en.q: Which about phones and lightning is correct?
en.exp: Phone radio waves don't attract lightning, but being the tallest point outdoors is risky.

zh.name: 泥石流逃生方向
zh.q: 泥石流来了应该往哪个方向跑？
opts: 垂直于泥石流方向的两侧
zh.exp: 应向泥石流流向的两侧山坡跑，垂直逃生是唯一正确方向。

en.name: Landslide Escape
en.q: Which direction to run from mudslide?
en.exp: Run perpendicular to the mudslide direction toward higher ground on either side.

zh.name: 泥石流前兆
zh.q: 以下哪个是泥石流的前兆？
zh.exp: 河水突然变浑浊、断流或有轰鸣声，可能是泥石流的前兆。

en.name: Landslide Warning
en.exp: Sudden muddy water, river cutoff, or rumbling sounds can indicate an approaching mudslide.

zh.name: 暴雪防护
zh.q: 暴雪天气最安全的做法是？
opts: 待在室内等待暴风雪过去
zh.exp: 暴雪天应尽量待在室内，外出容易迷路、冻伤或遭遇交通事故。

en.name: Blizzard Safety
en.exp: Stay indoors during blizzards to avoid getting lost, frostbite, or accidents.

zh.name: 失温症
zh.q: 人体核心温度低于多少度属于失温？
zh.exp: 正常体温约37°C，低于35°C即为失温症，可能导致心律不齐甚至死亡。

en.name: Hypothermia
en.exp: Normal body temp is ~37°C. Below 35°C is hypothermia, which can be fatal.

zh.name: 燃气泄漏
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏时不能做什么？
zh.exp: 开关电器会产生电火花，可能引燃泄漏的燃气，造成爆炸。

en.name: Gas Leak
en.q: What NOT to do with gas leak?
en.exp: Flipping light switches can create sparks that ignite leaking gas.

zh.name: 燃气安全检查
zh.q: 检查燃气泄漏的正确方法是？
opts: 用肥皂水涂抹接口看是否冒泡
zh.exp: 肥皂水涂在管道接口处，如果有气泡说明漏气。切勿用明火检查！

en.name: Gas Check
en.q: How to check for gas leaks?
opts: Soap water on joints for bubbles
en.exp: Apply soapy water to joints — bubbles indicate leaks. Never use open flame!

zh.name: 电梯被困
zh.q: 被困电梯时应该？
zh.exp: 被困电梯时保持冷静，按紧急呼叫按钮，等待专业人员救援是最安全的。

en.name: Elevator Stuck
en.exp: Stay calm, press emergency button, and wait for professional rescue.

zh.name: 余震危险
zh.q: 为什么余震可能比主震更危险？
zh.exp: 主震后建筑结构可能已经受损，余震虽然通常较弱，但足以使受损建筑坍塌。

en.name: Aftershock Danger
en.exp: Buildings weakened by the main quake can collapse from even smaller aftershocks.

zh.name: 火警电话
zh.q: 中国的火警电话是？
zh.exp: 119是火警电话，110是匪警，120是急救，122是交通事故。

en.name: Fire Number
en.exp: 119 is China's fire emergency number. 110=police, 120=ambulance, 122=traffic.

flavor: 积水超过30厘米不要步行

zh.name: 涉水安全深度
zh.q: 积水多深时不宜步行通过？
zh.exp: 30厘米的积水就能冲倒成人，且水下可能有打开的井盖等隐患。

en.name: Wading Depth
en.q: At what depth shouldn't you wade?
en.exp: 30cm of water can knock down an adult, and hidden dangers like open manholes may lurk below.

zh.name: 台风预警级别
zh.q: 台风预警中哪个颜色级别最严重？
zh.exp: 台风预警从轻到重：蓝色→黄色→橙色→红色，红色表示6小时内可能受超强台风影响。

en.name: Typhoon Alert Level
en.exp: From least to most severe: Blue→Yellow→Orange→Red. Red means super typhoon within 6 hours.

flavor: 室外防雷蹲下双脚并拢

zh.name: 室外防雷姿势
zh.q: 室外遇到雷电应该？
zh.exp: 蹲下并双脚并拢可以减少与地面的接触面积，降低被地电流伤害的风险。

en.name: Outdoor Lightning
en.exp: Crouching with feet together reduces ground contact and risk of ground current injury.

zh.name: 泥石流季节
zh.q: 泥石流最容易发生在什么季节？
zh.exp: 泥石流多发生在暴雨集中的夏季，大量雨水使山体土壤饱和而引发。

en.name: Mudslide Season
en.exp: Mudslides mostly occur during summer rains when saturated soil gives way.

zh.name: 暴雪驾驶
zh.q: 暴雪天开车最重要的是？
zh.exp: 暴雪天路面湿滑，应大幅减速、保持安全车距、使用近光灯和雾灯。

en.name: Blizzard Driving
en.exp: Slow down significantly, maintain safe distance, use low beams and fog lights.

flavor: 天然气比空气轻会向上飘

zh.name: 燃气密度
zh.q: 天然气泄漏后会向哪个方向扩散？
zh.exp: 天然气（甲烷）密度比空气小，泄漏后会向上飘散，所以开窗通风时上方效果更好。

en.name: Gas Density
en.q: Which direction does natural gas leak spread?
en.exp: Natural gas (methane) is lighter than air and rises, so upper ventilation is most effective.

zh.name: 电梯安全知识
zh.q: 以下关于电梯的说法正确的是？
opts: 电梯下坠时跳起来可以减伤
电梯是最安全的交通工具之一
zh.exp: 电梯有多重安全装置（限速器、安全钳等），事故率极低，是公认的最安全交通工具之一。

en.name: Elevator Safety
en.exp: Elevators have multiple safety devices and are statistically one of the safest transport methods.

flavor: 学校建筑抗震标准更高

zh.name: 建筑抗震设防
zh.q: 学校建筑的抗震设防标准是？
zh.exp: 中国规定学校、医院等人员密集场所的抗震设防标准比一般建筑高1度，更加严格。

en.name: Building Codes
en.exp: China requires schools and hospitals to meet seismic standards 1 degree stricter than regular buildings.

zh.name: 高层火灾逃生
zh.q: 高层建筑火灾时不能乘坐电梯的原因是？
zh.exp: 火灾时电梯可能断电停运，且电梯井会成为烟道，浓烟会灌入电梯轿厢。

en.name: High-rise Fire
en.q: Why no elevator in high-rise fire?
opts: May lose power and trap you
en.exp: Elevators may lose power, and elevator shafts become smoke chimneys filling the cabin.

zh.name: 趴下掩护
zh.q: 地震口诀'Duck, Cover, Hold'的中文是？
zh.exp: 地震时三个步骤：趴下（Duck）→用桌等掩护（Cover）→抓牢桌腿（Hold）

en.name: DCH
en.q: What does Duck Cover Hold mean?
opts: Get down cover and hold on
en.exp: Duck under furniture, Cover your head, Hold on until shaking stops.

zh.name: 门框误区
zh.q: 地震时站在门口是安全的吗？
opts: 不一定安全，现代建筑门框不够坚固
zh.exp: 老经验说门口安全是因为老式木结构，现代建筑的门框并不特别坚固。

en.name: Doorway Myth
opts: Not necessarily, modern doorways aren't reinforced
en.exp: Old advice assumed wooden frames; modern doorways aren't structurally stronger.

flavor: 地震时在教室听老师指挥

zh.name: 学校避震
zh.q: 在学校遇到地震应该怎么做？
opts: 听老师指挥躲在课桌下
zh.exp: 在学校应听老师指挥，迅速躲在课桌下，等震动停止后有序撤离。

en.name: School Earthquake
en.exp: Follow teacher's instructions, hide under desk, evacuate orderly after shaking stops.

zh.name: 低姿逃生
zh.q: 火灾逃生时正确的姿势是？
zh.exp: 弯腰或匍匐可以减少吸入有毒烟雾，烟雾在上方聚集，下方空气较清洁。

en.name: Crawl Low
en.exp: Crawling reduces smoke inhalation since hot smoke rises and air is cleaner near the floor.

zh.name: 防火意识
zh.q: 以下哪个行为最危险？
zh.exp: 儿童玩火是家庭火灾的重要原因之一，要教育小孩远离火源。

en.name: Fire Safety
en.exp: Children playing with fire is a major cause of home fires. Keep lighters away from kids.

zh.name: 身上着火
zh.q: 如果衣服着火了应该怎么做？
opts: 立即停下就地打滚压灭
zh.exp: 衣服着火应立即停下就地打滚压灭火焰，奔跑会使火势加大！

en.name: Clothes on Fire
en.exp: Stop, drop to the ground, and roll to smother the flames. Running fans the fire!

zh.name: 烟感报警器
zh.q: 家用烟雾报警器应该安装在哪里？
opts: 每个房间和走廊的天花板
zh.exp: 烟雾报警器应安装在每个房间和走廊的天花板上，确保第一时间发现火灾。

en.name: Smoke Alarm
en.exp: Install smoke alarms in every room and hallway ceiling for earliest fire detection.

zh.name: 洪水逃生
zh.q: 洪水来临时第一步应该？
zh.exp: 洪水来临时生命第一，立即向高处转移，不要浪费时间收拾物品。

en.name: Flood First Step
en.exp: Life first! Move to higher ground immediately. Don't waste time packing.

zh.name: 驾车过水
zh.q: 开车时遇到路面积水应该？
opts: 判断水深后绕行或等待
zh.exp: 不知道水深就不要贸然通过，30厘米的水就能让小车失控。

en.name: Driving Through Water
en.exp: Unknown water depth is dangerous. 30cm can disable a car. Detour or wait.

zh.name: 洪水预警
zh.q: 收到洪水蓝色预警应该怎么做？
opts: 做好转移准备关注后续预警
zh.exp: 蓝色预警是最低级别，应做好转移准备，关注后续预警等级变化。

en.name: Flood Warning
en.exp: Blue is the lowest level. Prepare to evacuate and monitor for升级 to higher alerts.

zh.name: 台风居家
zh.q: 台风来临前应该做的第一件事是？
zh.exp: 台风前应关紧门窗、收好阳台花盆等悬挂物，防止被风吹落伤人。

en.name: Typhoon Prep
en.exp: Secure windows and remove outdoor objects that could become projectiles in strong winds.

zh.name: 海边安全
zh.q: 台风天为什么要远离海边？
opts: 巨浪和风暴潮可能卷走人
zh.exp: 台风引发的巨浪和风暴潮极其危险，即使在远处也可能被卷走。

en.name: Beach Safety
en.exp: Typhoon waves and storm surge are deadly. Even from a distance you can be swept away.

zh.name: 台风间隙
zh.q: 台风暂时停歇时应该怎么做？
opts: 继续留在室内等待完全过去
zh.exp: 台风眼经过时会暂时平静，但很快会有反方向狂风，绝对不能外出！

en.name: Typhoon Lull
en.exp: The eye passes briefly — violent winds from the opposite direction return. Stay inside!

zh.name: 大树避雷
zh.q: 雷雨天为什么不要站在大树下？
opts: 大树是高处容易被雷击
zh.exp: 大树是最高的物体容易被雷击，电流可能通过树干传导到地面伤人。

en.name: Tree Lightning
en.exp: Tall trees attract lightning and current can travel through roots to ground, injuring people nearby.

zh.name: 雷雨电器
zh.q: 雷雨天为什么要拔掉电器插头？
opts: 雷击可能导致电涌损坏电器
zh.exp: 雷击会产生电涌，通过电线传导可能烧毁电器，拔掉插头可以保护设备。

en.name: Lightning Electronics
en.exp: Lightning causes power surges through wiring. Unplugging protects electronics from damage.

flavor: 闪电通道温度比太阳还高

zh.name: 闪电温度
zh.q: 闪电通道的温度大约是多少？
zh.exp: 闪电通道温度约30000°C，是太阳表面温度的5倍！这就是为什么雷击极其危险。

en.name: Lightning Temp
en.exp: Lightning reaches ~30000°C, five times the sun's surface. That's why strikes are so dangerous.

zh.name: 暴雨后防范
zh.q: 连续暴雨后最容易发生什么？
zh.exp: 连续暴雨使山体土壤饱和，最容易引发泥石流和滑坡。

en.name: After Heavy Rain
en.exp: Continuous rain saturates hillside soil, making landslides and mudslides most likely.

zh.name: 植被固土
zh.q: 为什么植树造林可以减少泥石流？
opts: 树根固定土壤防止流失
zh.exp: 树根可以固定土壤、减少水土流失，是天然的防灾屏障。

en.name: Trees Prevent
en.exp: Tree roots anchor soil and reduce erosion, acting as natural disaster prevention barriers.

zh.name: 泥石流速度
zh.q: 泥石流最快可以达到多少速度？
zh.exp: 泥石流速度可达60公里/小时，人根本跑不过，所以要提前撤离！

en.name: Mudslide Speed
en.exp: Mudslides can reach 60 km/h — humans can't outrun them, so early evacuation is key.

zh.name: 保暖要点
zh.q: 暴风雪中保持体温最重要的方法是？
zh.exp: 保持衣物干燥是保暖的关键，湿衣物会使体温快速流失。

en.name: Stay Warm
en.q: Most important for staying warm in blizzard?
en.exp: Keeping clothes dry is crucial — wet clothing causes rapid heat loss.

zh.name: 暴雪准备
zh.q: 暴雪来临前应该储备什么？
zh.exp: 暴雪可能造成停电断水交通中断，应储备食物、饮水、药品、手电筒等应急物资。

en.name: Blizzard Prep
en.exp: Blizzards can cause power outages and cut off supplies. Stock food, water, medicine, and flashlights.

flavor: 被困车内要清排气管积雪

zh.name: 雪中被困车内
zh.q: 暴雪天被困车内最重要的是？
opts: 确保排气管不被雪堵住
zh.exp: 排气管被堵会导致一氧化碳中毒，必须确保排气管畅通并适当开窗通风。

en.name: Car Trapped
en.q: Most important when trapped in car in blizzard?
opts: Keep exhaust pipe clear of snow
en.exp: Blocked exhaust causes carbon monoxide poisoning. Clear the pipe and ventilate slightly.

zh.name: 燃气与电话
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏后为什么不能在室内打电话？
opts: 手机可能产生微弱火花
zh.exp: 虽然概率很小，但手机操作可能产生微弱电火花，在高浓度燃气环境中可能引爆。

en.name: Gas and Phone
en.q: Why no phone indoors during gas leak?
en.exp: Though rare, phone operation can create tiny sparks that could ignite high-concentration gas.

zh.name: 燃气检查
zh.q: 燃气管道多久应该检查一次？
zh.exp: 燃气管道和设备应每年至少检查一次，及时发现老化和泄漏隐患。

en.name: Gas Inspection
en.exp: Gas pipes and appliances should be inspected at least annually to catch aging and leaks early.

zh.name: 不开灯排查
zh.q: 怀疑燃气泄漏时为什么不能开灯检查？
opts: 开关灯的电弧可能引爆燃气
zh.exp: 开关灯时产生的微小电弧足以引爆达到浓度的燃气。

en.name: No Light Check
en.q: Why not turn on lights during gas leak?
en.exp: Small arcs from light switches can ignite gas at dangerous concentrations.

flavor: 地震蹲在桌下抓牢桌腿

zh.name: 桌下避震
zh.q: 在学校遇到地震应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 课桌是教室里最好的掩护物，蹲下后抓牢桌腿防止移位。

en.name: Under Desk
opts: Hide under desk hold its legs
en.exp: Desks are the best cover in classrooms. Hold onto the legs so it doesn't move.

zh.name: 废墟求救
zh.q: 被困废墟中怎样求救最有效？
opts: 间歇性敲击管道或墙壁
zh.exp: 持续喊叫会很快耗尽体力，间歇性敲击更省力且更容易被探测仪发现。

en.name: Trapped Rescue
en.q: Most effective way to signal when trapped?
opts: Intermittent tapping on pipes or walls
en.exp: Screaming wastes energy fast. Intermittent tapping saves energy and is easier for rescue devices to detect.

zh.name: 家具固定
zh.q: 地震时最容易造成伤害的是？
opts: 倾倒的家具和掉落的物品
zh.exp: 地震伤亡中很大比例是被倾倒的书柜、衣柜和掉落物品砸伤，提前固定家具很重要。

en.name: Secure Furniture
en.exp: Toppled bookcases and falling objects cause many injuries. Securing furniture saves lives.

flavor: 灭火器使用口诀提拉握压

zh.name: 灭火器用法
zh.q: 灭火器使用口诀'提拉握压'的顺序是？
opts: 提起来拉保险销握喷管压把手
zh.exp: 提灭火器→拉保险销→握喷管→压把手，四步口诀要记牢！

en.name: Extinguisher
opts: Lift pull pin aim nozzle squeeze handle
en.exp: Remember: Lift → Pull pin → Aim nozzle → Squeeze handle. Four simple steps!

zh.name: 厨房安全
zh.q: 厨房做饭时最重要的安全习惯是？
zh.exp: 厨房是火灾高发区，做饭时不要离开，油锅着火要用锅盖盖灭。

en.name: Kitchen Safety
en.exp: Kitchen is a fire hotspot. Never leave cooking alone. Cover oil fires with a lid.

zh.name: 油锅灭火
zh.q: 油锅着火应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 油锅着火绝对不能用水！水遇热油会爆溅。盖上锅盖切断氧气即可灭火。

en.name: Oil Fire
opts: Cover with lid turn off heat
en.exp: NEVER use water on oil fires — it causes explosive splashing. Cover with lid to cut oxygen.

flavor: 暴雨天不在低洼处逗留

zh.name: 避开低洼
zh.q: 暴雨时为什么不能在低洼地停留？
opts: 积水可能迅速上涨淹没
zh.exp: 低洼处是积水汇集地，暴雨时水位可能在几分钟内暴涨，非常危险。

en.name: Avoid Low Areas
en.q: Why avoid low areas in heavy rain?
en.exp: Low areas collect runoff. Water levels can surge dangerously in minutes during heavy rain.

zh.name: 选址防洪
zh.q: 建房子选址最需要注意什么？
zh.exp: 河道两岸和低洼地带是洪水最易到达的区域，建房应选安全地带。

en.name: Location Safety
opts: Stay away from rivers and low areas
en.exp: Riverbanks and low areas are flood-prone. Build in safe zones away from water.

flavor: 被洪水围困要向外界发出信号

zh.name: 被困信号
zh.q: 被洪水困在房子里怎样求救？
opts: 在屋顶挥舞鲜艳衣物或用镜子反光
zh.exp: 在高处用鲜艳物品或镜子反射阳光可以引起直升机和救援人员注意。

en.name: Flood Signal
en.q: Trapped in house by flood how to signal?
opts: Wave bright cloth or use mirror reflection
en.exp: Use bright materials or mirror reflections on high ground to attract helicopter and rescuer attention.

flavor: 台风前备好三天食物水

zh.name: 台风储备
zh.q: 台风来临前最少储备几天的食物和水？
zh.exp: 台风可能导致停电断水，至少准备3天的食物和饮用水。

en.name: Typhoon Stock
en.q: Minimum days of food/water for typhoon?
en.exp: Typhoons can cut power and water. Prepare at least 3 days of food and drinking water.

flavor: 台风天不要在树下避雨

zh.name: 台风避树
zh.q: 台风天在室外应该远离什么？
zh.exp: 台风可能吹倒树木、吹落广告牌、吹断电线，室外很危险。

en.name: Avoid Hazards
en.q: Stay away from what outside in typhoon?
en.exp: Typhoons topple trees, knock down signs, and snap power lines. Being outside is very dangerous.

zh.name: 雷雨行走
zh.q: 雷雨天在外面没地方躲应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 蹲下降低身体高度可以减少被雷击概率，不要跑因为跑会增加跨步电压。

en.name: Lightning Outside
en.exp: Crouching reduces lightning risk. Don't run — running increases step voltage from ground current.

flavor: 雷雨天不要用太阳能热水器

zh.name: 雷雨用水器
zh.q: 雷雨天使用什么家电有风险？
opts: 太阳能热水器（装在屋顶）
zh.exp: 太阳能热水器安装在屋顶最高处且有水管连接，雷雨天使用有被雷击传导的风险。

en.name: Lightning Appliance
en.exp: Solar heaters are on the highest point with water pipes connecting inside — lightning strike risk.

flavor: 听到隆隆声要立即撤离

zh.name: 泥石流前兆
zh.q: 以下哪个可能是泥石流的前兆？
opts: 山谷传来隆隆声和树木断裂声
zh.exp: 听到山谷传来异常声响是泥石流的重要前兆，要立即向两侧高地撤离！

en.name: Mudslide Warning
opts: Rumbling and tree cracking from valley
en.exp: Unusual sounds from valleys signal mudslides. Evacuate to higher ground on either side immediately!

flavor: 切坡建房要评估地质风险

zh.name: 建房选址
zh.q: 在山区建房最重要的安全考虑是？
opts: 评估地质灾害风险避开滑坡体
zh.exp: 山区建房必须进行地质灾害风险评估，避开已知滑坡体和泥石流沟口。

en.name: Mountain Building
en.q: Most important when building in mountains?
opts: Assess geological risk avoid slide zones
en.exp: Mountain construction must assess geological risks and avoid known landslide zones and mudflow channels.

zh.name: 雪天驾车
zh.q: 雪天开车应该怎么操作？
opts: 减速慢行加大跟车距离
zh.exp: 雪天路滑，制动距离大大增加，必须减速并保持更大跟车距离。

en.name: Driving in Snow
en.exp: Snow makes roads slippery with much longer braking distance. Slow down and keep extra following distance.

zh.name: 雪洞求生
zh.q: 在暴风雪中无处躲避时可以怎么做？
zh.exp: 在极端暴风雪中，挖雪洞是求生的关键技术，雪洞内温度可保持在0°C左右。

en.name: Snow Cave
en.q: No shelter in blizzard what to do?
opts: Dig a snow cave for shelter
en.exp: In extreme blizzards, digging a snow cave is vital survival tech. Inside temp stays around 0°C.

zh.name: 燃气灶安全
zh.q: 燃气灶旁边不应该放什么？
zh.exp: 纸张、抹布等易燃物放在燃气灶旁可能被引燃，保持灶台整洁很重要。

en.name: Stove Safety
en.q: What not to keep near gas stove?
opts: Flammable items like paper and towels
en.exp: Paper and towels near stoves can catch fire. Keep the area clean and clear of flammables.

flavor: 燃气泄漏先开窗再关阀门

zh.name: 泄漏处理顺序
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏的正确处理顺序是？
zh.exp: 先开窗通风降低浓度，再关闭阀门切断气源，这样最安全。

en.name: Leak Procedure
en.exp: Ventilate first to lower concentration, then shut off the valve. This is the safest order.

flavor: 家庭应急包要定期检查更新

zh.name: 应急包检查
zh.q: 家庭应急包应该多久检查一次？
opts: 每半年检查一次换过期物品
zh.exp: 应急包里的食物、药品、电池都有保质期，每半年应检查更换。

en.name: Kit Check
en.exp: Food, medicine, batteries in kits expire. Check and replace every 6 months.

zh.name: 紧急电话
zh.q: 中国的急救电话号码是？
zh.exp: 110报警、119火警、120急救、122交通事故，要牢记！

en.name: Emergency Numbers
en.exp: 110 Police, 119 Fire, 120 Medical, 122 Traffic. Memorize these numbers!

flavor: 通讯中断约定家人集合点

zh.name: 家庭计划
zh.q: 防灾准备中最重要的家庭措施是？
opts: 约定紧急集合点和联络方式
zh.exp: 灾害时通讯可能中断，提前约定家人集合点和紧急联络方式至关重要。

en.name: Family Plan
opts: Set emergency meeting point and contact plan
en.exp: Communication may fail in disasters. Pre-agreed meeting points and contact plans are essential.

flavor: 每年至少参加一次应急演练

zh.name: 应急演练
zh.q: 参加应急演练的意义是什么？
opts: 熟悉逃生路线和自救动作
zh.exp: 应急演练让身体记住逃生路线和自救动作，真正灾害时可以条件反射式行动。

en.name: Drill Practice
en.exp: Drills train muscle memory for escape routes and self-rescue. In real disasters, you react automatically.

flavor: 拨打120时要说明位置和伤情

zh.name: 急救电话内容
zh.q: 拨打120急救电话时最重要的是？
opts: 说清楚地点和伤者情况
zh.exp: 拨打120要说清：1.位置地址 2.伤者人数和伤情 3.联系方式。保持电话畅通。

en.name: Calling 120
opts: Clearly state location and patient condition
en.exp: Tell dispatchers: 1. Exact location 2. Number and condition of patients 3. Your contact. Stay on the line.

flavor: 地震后要检查燃气管道

zh.name: 震后排查
zh.q: 地震停止后回家第一件事应该？
opts: 检查燃气管道和电线是否损坏
zh.exp: 地震可能导致燃气泄漏和电线损坏，回家后应先排查这些安全隐患。

en.name: After Quake Check
en.q: First thing when returning home after quake?
opts: Check gas pipes and wiring for damage
en.exp: Quakes can damage gas lines and wiring. Inspect these hazards first when returning home.

flavor: 逃生时摸门把判断火势

zh.name: 门外有火
zh.q: 逃生时发现门很热应该怎么做？
opts: 不要开门改走其他出口
zh.exp: 门很热说明门外有大火，开门会导致火势涌入。应改走窗户或其他出口。

en.name: Hot Door
en.q: Door is hot during fire escape?
en.exp: Hot door means fire on the other side. Opening causes flashover. Find another exit.

flavor: 洪水过后不能直接喝自来水

zh.name: 洪水后饮水
zh.q: 洪水退后能直接喝自来水吗？
opts: 不能要煮沸或用净水片
zh.exp: 洪水可能污染水源，自来水系统可能受损，必须煮沸消毒后才能饮用。

en.name: Post-Flood Water
en.q: Can you drink tap water after flood?
en.exp: Floods contaminate water sources and may damage water systems. Boil before drinking.

flavor: 台风过后也要小心高空坠物

zh.name: 台风后安全
zh.q: 台风过后可以立即出门吗？
opts: 要小心高空坠物和积水触电
zh.exp: 台风过后建筑松动、电线可能掉落积水、树枝断裂，出行仍需格外小心。

en.name: After Typhoon
en.q: Safe to go out right after typhoon?
opts: Be careful of falling objects and flood electrocution
en.exp: After typhoons: loose buildings, fallen wires in puddles, broken branches. Stay cautious.

flavor: 高温天气多喝水少外出

zh.name: 热浪防范
zh.q: 高温天气应该怎么做？
opts: 多喝水减少外出穿浅色衣服
zh.exp: 高温天要多补水、少在烈日下活动、穿浅色透气衣物、避免中暑。

en.name: Heat Safety
opts: Drink water avoid going out wear light colors
en.exp: Stay hydrated, minimize sun exposure, wear light breathable colors, avoid heatstroke.

zh.name: 中暑急救
zh.q: 发现有人中暑应该怎么做？
opts: 转移到阴凉处降温补充水分
zh.exp: 中暑急救：移到阴凉处→解开衣物→物理降温→补充水分。严重时拨打120。

en.name: Heatstroke Aid
opts: Move to shade cool down give water
en.exp: Heatstroke first aid: shade → loosen clothes → cool down → hydrate. Call 120 if severe.

flavor: 热射病是最严重的中暑

zh.name: 热射病
zh.q: 热射病和普通中暑最大的区别是？
zh.exp: 热射病是中暑最严重类型，体温超过40°C，可能出现意识障碍，是致命急症！

en.name: Heatstroke Emergency
en.q: How is heatstroke different from mild heat illness?
en.exp: Heatstroke is severe: temp over 40°C, possible unconsciousness. It's a life-threatening emergency!

zh.name: 雾天驾车
zh.q: 大雾天开车应该怎么做？
opts: 减速慢行开雾灯和双闪
zh.exp: 雾天能见度低，要减速、开雾灯和双闪、保持安全车距。远光灯会反射更看不清！

en.name: Driving in Fog
opts: Use high beams and speed up
Slow down use fog lights and hazards
en.exp: Fog reduces visibility. Slow down, use fog lights and hazards. High beams reflect back and blind you!

zh.name: 雾天健康
zh.q: 大雾天出行要注意什么？
opts: 戴口罩减少有害颗粒吸入
zh.exp: 雾中含有很多有害颗粒物，外出应戴口罩，减少户外活动。

en.name: Fog Health
opts: Wear mask to reduce particle inhalation
en.exp: Fog contains harmful particles. Wear a mask and reduce outdoor activities.

flavor: 暴雨时不要在桥上逗留

zh.name: 暴雨安全
zh.q: 暴雨时哪些地方最危险？
zh.exp: 桥梁、涵洞、低洼地带在暴雨时容易被淹没，行人应远离这些区域。

en.name: Storm Safety
en.q: Most dangerous places in heavy rain?
en.exp: Bridges, tunnels and low areas flood quickly. Stay away from these during heavy rain.

flavor: 遇到冰雹要找坚固遮挡

zh.name: 冰雹防护
zh.q: 户外遇到冰雹应该怎么做？
opts: 尽快进入坚固建筑物躲避
zh.exp: 冰雹可能造成严重伤害，要尽快进入建筑物或车内躲避，远离玻璃窗。

en.name: Hail Safety
en.exp: Hail can injure seriously. Get into a building or car fast. Stay away from glass windows.

flavor: 暴风雨前收好阳台物品

zh.name: 阳台安全
zh.q: 暴风雨前阳台上的花盆应该？
zh.exp: 阳台花盆等物品在强风中可能被吹落砸伤行人，暴风雨前应移入室内或加固。

en.name: Balcony Safety
en.q: Potted plants on balcony before storm?
en.exp: Potted plants can become dangerous projectiles in strong winds. Move inside or secure before storms.

zh.name: 保护头部
zh.q: 任何灾害中最重要的自我保护动作是？
zh.exp: 头部是最重要的器官，任何灾害中都要优先保护头部，用书包或双手护住。

en.name: Protect Head
en.q: Most important self-protection in any disaster?
en.exp: The head contains the most vital organs. Always protect it first with arms, backpack, or any cushion.

zh.name: 灾后心理
zh.q: 经历灾害后出现做噩梦的情况应该？
opts: 这是正常的应激反应可以寻求帮助
zh.exp: 灾害后的恐惧、噩梦、焦虑是正常的应激反应，及时寻求心理帮助很重要。

en.name: Post-Disaster Mental
en.exp: Fear, nightmares, and anxiety after disasters are normal stress reactions. Seek psychological help.

zh.name: 响应警报
zh.q: 听到防空警报或灾害警报时应该怎么做？
opts: 立即按照应急预案行动
zh.exp: 听到警报意味着危险迫近，应立即按预案行动，不要犹豫或观望。

en.name: Respond to Alarm
en.exp: Alarms mean danger is imminent. Follow your emergency plan without hesitation.

zh.name: CPR急救
zh.q: 心肺复苏(CPR)按压胸部的频率是？
zh.exp: CPR按压频率100-120次/分钟，深度5-6厘米，节奏类似《小苹果》的节拍。

en.name: CPR Rate
en.exp: CPR rate: 100-120 compressions/minute, 5-6cm deep. Think of the beat of a fast song.

zh.name: 海姆立克
zh.q: 遇到有人被食物噎住应该怎么做？
opts: 使用海姆立克腹部冲击法
zh.exp: 海姆立克法：从背后抱住患者腹部，向上向内快速冲击，利用气流冲出异物。

en.name: Heimlich Maneuver
en.exp: Heimlich: wrap arms around abdomen from behind, thrust upward and inward to force the object out.

zh.name: 震后禁火
zh.q: 地震后为什么不要使用明火？
opts: 可能有燃气泄漏引发爆炸
zh.exp: 地震可能损坏燃气管道导致泄漏，明火可能引发爆炸。使用手电筒照明。

en.name: No Fire After Quake
en.q: Why no open flames after earthquake?
en.exp: Quakes can damage gas pipes causing leaks. Open flames could ignite an explosion. Use flashlights.

zh.name: 建筑抗震
zh.q: 中国的建筑抗震设防标准分为几个等级？
zh.exp: 中国建筑抗震设防烈度分为6、7、8、9度，不同地区要求不同。

en.name: Seismic Standards
en.q: How many seismic fortification levels in China?
en.exp: China's seismic fortification: 6, 7, 8, 9 degrees. Requirements vary by region.

zh.name: 逃生命第一
zh.q: 火灾逃生时发现贵重物品忘了拿应该？
zh.exp: 火灾逃生时间极其宝贵，返回拿物品可能错过最佳逃生时机，生命比财物重要！

en.name: Life First
en.exp: Escape time is precious. Going back for belongings costs valuable seconds. Life > property!

zh.name: 认识安全出口
zh.q: 进入公共场所时首先应该注意什么？
opts: 安全出口和疏散通道的位置
zh.exp: 进入任何公共场所，第一时间观察安全出口和疏散通道，关键时刻能救命。

en.name: Know Exits
en.q: First thing to notice in a public building?
opts: Location of emergency exits and evacuation routes
en.exp: In any public building, note exits and evacuation routes first. It can save your life.

zh.name: 防洪沙袋
zh.q: 防洪沙袋应该怎么摆放？
zh.exp: 沙袋应交错堆叠像砌砖一样，底部较宽形成稳定的防水墙。

en.name: Sandbag Placement
en.q: How to stack sandbags for flood?
en.exp: Sandbags should be staggered like bricks, wider base facing inward for a stable barrier.

flavor: 台风天不要外出捡东西

zh.name: 台风外出
zh.q: 台风天衣服被吹跑了应该怎么做？
opts: 不要追等台风过了再说
zh.exp: 台风天外出捡东西极其危险，被吹落的物体和大风随时可能伤人。衣服不值一条命。

en.name: Lost Clothes
opts: Don't chase wait for storm to pass
en.exp: Chasing belongings in a typhoon is extremely dangerous. Wind and debris can injure or kill. Clothes aren't worth your life.

flavor: 雷击伤者可以安全触碰

zh.name: 雷击救助
zh.q: 可以触碰被雷击的人吗？
opts: 可以雷击伤者不带电不可以
zh.exp: 被雷击的人身上不带电，可以安全触碰并进行急救。应立即拨打120并进行CPR。

en.name: Lightning Strike Aid
en.q: Can you touch a lightning strike victim?
en.exp: Lightning strike victims carry no charge. Touch safely, call 120, and begin CPR if needed.

flavor: 高温天气车内温度极高

zh.name: 车内高温
zh.q: 夏天车内温度最高可以达到多少度？
zh.exp: 夏天阳光直射下，车内温度可在15分钟内超过60°C，绝对不能把孩子或宠物留在车内！

en.name: Car Heat
en.q: How hot can a car get in summer?
en.exp: In direct sun, car interior can exceed 60°C in 15 minutes. NEVER leave children or pets in cars!

flavor: 补充水分也要补充电解质

zh.name: 补水补盐
zh.q: 大量出汗后只喝白水够吗？
zh.exp: 大量出汗后身体流失盐分和电解质，只喝白水可能导致低钠血症，应补充淡盐水或运动饮料。

en.name: Electrolytes
en.q: Is plain water enough after heavy sweating?
en.exp: Heavy sweating depletes salts and electrolytes. Plain water alone can cause hyponatremia. Drink sports drinks.

zh.name: 雾天出行
zh.q: 大雾天气可能影响什么交通方式？
zh.exp: 大雾严重影响航班起降和高速公路，出行前要关注天气预报和航班信息。

en.name: Fog Travel
en.exp: Fog severely impacts flights and highways. Check weather and flight status before traveling.

flavor: 遇到龙卷风要找最低处

zh.name: 龙卷风避难
zh.q: 户外遇到龙卷风应该怎么做？
opts: 找低洼地趴下护住头部
zh.exp: 龙卷风极其危险！找低洼地趴下护住头部，远离树木和车辆。不要试图逆风跑。

en.name: Tornado Safety
opts: Find low ground lie flat protect head
en.exp: Tornadoes are deadly! Find low ground, lie flat, protect head. Stay away from trees and vehicles.

zh.name: 家庭药箱
zh.q: 家庭急救药箱应该放在哪里？
opts: 干燥阴凉处孩子够不到的地方
zh.exp: 急救药箱应放在干燥、阴凉、孩子够不到的地方，定期检查药品有效期。

en.name: First Aid Kit
en.q: Where to store home first aid kit?
opts: Cool dry place out of children's reach
en.exp: Store first aid kits in cool dry places, out of children's reach. Check expiration dates regularly.

flavor: 止血要用干净布料压迫

zh.name: 止血方法
zh.q: 伤口大量出血时应该怎么做？
opts: 用干净布料直接压迫伤口
zh.exp: 大量出血时用干净布料用力按压伤口，抬高受伤部位，尽快就医。

en.name: Stop Bleeding
opts: Press clean cloth firmly on wound
en.exp: Press clean cloth firmly on the wound. Elevate the injured area. Seek medical help promptly.

flavor: 灾后饮用水要消毒处理

zh.name: 水源消毒
zh.q: 灾后不确定水源是否安全时应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 不确定水源安全时，煮沸3分钟是最简单有效的消毒方法，能杀灭大部分病原体。

en.name: Water Purification
en.q: Water source safety uncertain after disaster?
en.exp: Boiling for 3+ minutes is the simplest effective purification method, killing most pathogens.

zh.name: 地铁地震
zh.q: 在地铁上遇到地震应该怎么做？
opts: 抓牢扶手或柱子等待停车
zh.exp: 地铁有紧急制动系统，地震时抓紧固定物等待停车，不要试图打开车门跳车。

en.name: Subway Quake
en.exp: Subway has emergency brakes. Hold on and wait for the train to stop. Don't try to exit between stations.

flavor: 地震三角空间说法有争议

zh.name: 生命三角
zh.q: '生命三角'理论是被广泛认可的吗？
opts: 不是有争议趴下掩护抓牢更安全
zh.exp: 生命三角理论存在争议，国际公认的仍是趴下-掩护-抓牢(DCH)方法。

en.name: Triangle of Life
en.q: Is Triangle of Life theory widely accepted?
en.exp: Triangle of Life is controversial. Duck-Cover-Hold (DCH) remains the internationally recommended method.

flavor: 地震时电梯会自动停运

zh.name: 电梯地震
zh.q: 地震时被困在电梯里应该怎么做？
opts: 按下所有楼层按钮蹲下等待
zh.exp: 按下所有楼层按钮让电梯在最近楼层停下，如果停不了就蹲下等待救援。

en.name: Stuck in Elevator
opts: Press all floor buttons crouch and wait
en.exp: Press all floor buttons to stop at nearest floor. If it won't stop, crouch and wait for rescue.

flavor: 消防通道不能堆放杂物

zh.name: 消防通道
zh.q: 为什么消防通道不能堆放杂物？
zh.exp: 消防通道是生命通道，堆放杂物会严重阻碍人员逃生和消防员进入救援。

en.name: Fire Lane
en.q: Why no clutter in fire lanes?
en.exp: Fire lanes are life channels. Clutter blocks people from escaping and firefighters from entering.

flavor: 电动车不能在楼道充电

zh.name: 电动车充电
zh.q: 电动车应该在哪里充电？
opts: 室外指定充电点不能在楼道
zh.exp: 电动车电池充电可能引发火灾甚至爆炸，严禁在楼道和室内充电！

en.name: E-bike Charging
opts: Designated outdoor spots not in hallways
en.exp: E-bike batteries can catch fire or explode while charging. NEVER charge in hallways or indoors!

flavor: 火灾报警器响了要认真对待

zh.name: 报警器响
zh.q: 家里的烟雾报警器突然响了应该？
zh.exp: 烟雾报警器响了先检查是否有火情，确认安全后检查是否需要换电池。

en.name: Alarm Rings
en.q: Smoke alarm goes off at home?
en.exp: When alarm sounds, check for fire first. If safe, check if battery needs replacing.

zh.name: 山洪速度
zh.q: 山洪暴发时水流速度最快可达？
opts: 每秒数米比人跑步还快
zh.exp: 山洪流速可达每秒数米甚至更快，远超人的跑步速度，绝对不能低估山洪的威力！

en.name: Flash Flood Speed
en.q: How fast can flash floods flow?
opts: Several meters per second faster than running
en.exp: Flash floods can flow several meters per second, much faster than a person can run. Never underestimate!

flavor: 雨季检查房屋排水系统

zh.name: 排水检查
zh.q: 雨季来临前应该检查什么？
opts: 屋顶排水沟和下水道是否畅通
zh.exp: 排水沟堵塞会导致屋顶漏水和地面积水，雨季前应清理排水系统。

en.name: Drain Check
en.q: What to check before rainy season?
en.exp: Blocked gutters cause roof leaks and standing water. Clean drainage systems before rainy season.

zh.name: 加固窗户
zh.q: 台风来临前窗户应该怎样加固？
opts: 贴米字形胶带或安装防风板
zh.exp: 在玻璃上贴米字形胶带可以防止碎片飞溅，有条件的安装防风板效果更好。

en.name: Window Reinforce
en.q: How to reinforce windows before typhoon?
opts: Tape X pattern or install storm shutters
en.exp: Taping glass in X patterns prevents shattering. Storm shutters are even better if available.

flavor: 台风眼过后风向会反转

zh.name: 风向反转
zh.q: 台风眼过后风向会怎样变化？
opts: 风向反转风力可能更强
zh.exp: 台风眼过后风向会反转180度，且风力可能比之前更强，千万不能出去！

en.name: Wind Reversal
en.q: Wind direction after typhoon eye passes?
en.exp: After the eye, winds reverse 180 degrees and may be stronger. STAY INSIDE!

zh.name: 水边雷击
zh.q: 雷雨天为什么不能在游泳池或河边？
zh.exp: 水是良好的导体，在水边或水中被雷击的风险极高。雷雨天应远离一切水域。

en.name: Water Lightning
en.exp: Water is an excellent conductor. Being in or near water during lightning greatly increases risk.

flavor: 手机不会引雷但户外少用

zh.name: 手机引雷
zh.q: 手机会引来雷电吗？
opts: 不会但户外打电话会分散注意力
zh.exp: 手机本身不会引雷，但雷雨天户外使用手机会分散注意力，影响及时躲避。

en.name: Phone Lightning
en.exp: Phones don't attract lightning, but using them outdoors distracts you from seeking shelter.

zh.name: 泥石流逃生
zh.q: 遇到泥石流应该往哪个方向跑？
opts: 向泥石流方向的两侧高处跑
zh.exp: 泥石流速度快且力量大，顺着或逆着跑都来不及，必须向两侧高处撤离！

en.name: Mudslide Escape
en.q: Which direction to run from mudslide?
opts: To high ground on either side
en.exp: Mudslides are too fast to outrun in any direction along the path. Go to high ground on either side!

flavor: 不要在沟谷中搭建帐篷

zh.name: 露营选址
zh.q: 在山区露营时帐篷应该搭在哪里？
opts: 高处平坦开阔地远离沟谷
zh.exp: 露营应选高处平坦开阔地，远离沟谷和山坡，避免暴雨引发泥石流和落石。

en.name: Campsite Safety
en.q: Where to set up camp in mountains?
opts: High flat open ground away from valleys
en.exp: Camp on high flat ground away from valleys and slopes to avoid flash floods and rockfalls.

zh.name: 雪天着装
zh.q: 暴风雪天气外出应该穿什么颜色的衣服？
zh.exp: 鲜艳颜色的衣服在雪地中更容易被发现，万一被困便于救援人员寻找。

en.name: Snow Clothing
opts: Bright colors like orange or red
en.exp: Bright colors are easier to spot against snow, helping rescuers find you if stranded.

flavor: 雪天屋顶积雪要及时清理

zh.name: 屋顶积雪
zh.q: 大雪后屋顶积雪过多会怎样？
zh.exp: 大量积雪很重，可能导致屋顶坍塌。大雪后应及时安全清除屋顶积雪。

en.name: Roof Snow
en.exp: Snow is heavy and can collapse roofs. Safely clear excess snow from roofs after heavy snowfall.

flavor: 燃气管道上不能挂东西

zh.name: 管道安全
zh.q: 燃气管道可以挂东西吗？
opts: 不可以可能导致管道泄漏
zh.exp: 在燃气管道上挂东西可能导致管道变形或接口松动，造成燃气泄漏。

en.name: Pipe Safety
en.q: Can you hang things on gas pipes?
opts: No may cause pipe damage and leaks
en.exp: Hanging items on gas pipes can deform them or loosen joints, causing gas leaks.

flavor: 燃气报警器要定期测试

zh.name: 报警器维护
zh.q: 燃气报警器应该多久测试一次？
zh.exp: 燃气报警器每月应按下测试按钮检查是否正常工作，电池每年更换。

en.name: Alarm Test
en.exp: Test gas alarms monthly by pressing the test button. Replace batteries annually.

zh.name: 户外大风
zh.q: 户外突遇10级以上大风应该怎么做？
opts: 立即蹲下抓住固定物护住头部
zh.exp: 强风可能吹飞人和物品，应立即蹲下降低重心，抓住固定物并保护头部。

en.name: Extreme Wind
opts: Crouch grab fixed object protect head
en.exp: Strong winds can blow people over. Crouch low, grab something fixed, and protect your head.

flavor: 核泄漏时关闭门窗留在室内

zh.name: 核辐射防护
zh.q: 发生核泄漏时最简单的防护措施是？
opts: 关闭门窗留在室内收听官方通报
zh.exp: 核泄漏时关闭门窗、留在室内是最简单的防护。听从官方指挥，不要擅自行动。

en.name: Nuclear Protection
opts: Close windows stay indoors follow official info
en.exp: During nuclear leaks: close windows, stay indoors, follow official instructions. Don't act on your own.

zh.name: 碘片使用
zh.q: 核泄漏时应该立即服用碘片吗？
opts: 要听从官方指令不能随便吃
zh.exp: 碘片只有在官方指令下服用才有效，提前或过量服用反而有害。

en.name: Iodine Pills
en.q: Take iodine pills during nuclear leak?
en.exp: Iodine pills are only effective under official guidance. Premature or excessive doses can be harmful.

zh.name: 化学品泄漏
zh.q: 遇到化学品泄漏应该往哪个方向撤？
zh.exp: 化学气体向下风向扩散，要向上风方向（逆风）撤离，远离泄漏源。

en.name: Chemical Leak
en.q: Which direction to evacuate chemical leak?
en.exp: Chemicals drift downwind. Evacuate upwind, away from the leak source.

flavor: 化学品灼伤要用大量清水冲洗

zh.name: 化学品灼伤
zh.q: 皮肤接触化学品后应该怎么做？
opts: 立即用大量清水冲洗至少15分钟
zh.exp: 化学品灼伤要用大量流动清水冲洗至少15分钟，同时脱去被污染的衣物。

en.name: Chemical Burn
opts: Flush with water at least 15 minutes
en.exp: Flush chemical burns with running water for at least 15 minutes. Remove contaminated clothing.

flavor: 海啸前海水会异常退去

zh.name: 海啸前兆
zh.q: 海啸到来前海滩可能出现什么现象？
opts: 海水异常快速退去露出海底
zh.exp: 海啸前海水可能快速退去露出平时看不到的海底，看到此现象要立即向高处撤离！

en.name: Tsunami Sign
en.q: What happens at beach before tsunami?
en.exp: Before tsunamis, water may rapidly recede exposing the seabed. See this? RUN to high ground immediately!

zh.name: 多波海啸
zh.q: 第一波海啸过后可以回到海边吗？
opts: 不可以后面可能有更大的波
zh.exp: 海啸通常有多波，后面几波可能更大！至少等官方确认安全后才能返回。

en.name: Multiple Waves
en.q: Return to coast after first tsunami wave?
en.exp: Tsunamis come in multiple waves. Later waves can be larger! Wait for official all-clear.

flavor: 灾害时保持冷静最重要

zh.name: 保持冷静
zh.q: 遇到任何灾害时最重要的心态是？
zh.exp: 恐慌会导致错误判断，保持冷静才能做出正确的逃生决策。

en.name: Stay Calm
en.q: Most important mindset in any disaster?
en.exp: Panic leads to poor decisions. Staying calm lets you make correct escape choices.

flavor: 了解所在地区的灾害风险

zh.name: 风险认知
zh.q: 防灾准备的第一步是什么？
opts: 了解你所在地区面临什么灾害风险
zh.exp: 不同地区面临不同灾害风险，先了解本地风险才能有针对性地准备。

en.name: Risk Awareness
opts: Know what risks your area faces
en.exp: Different areas face different risks. Know your local hazards to prepare effectively.

zh.name: 不信谣传谣
zh.q: 灾害期间看到未经证实的消息应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 灾害谣言会制造恐慌，应只相信官方渠道发布的信息。

en.name: No Rumors
opts: Don't share wait for official info
en.exp: Disaster rumors cause panic. Only trust information from official channels.

zh.name: 灭火器技能
zh.q: 你实际使用过灭火器吗？
opts: 参加演练学过但没真正用过
zh.exp: 建议每个人都参加一次灭火器实操演练，真遇到火灾时才知道怎么用。

en.name: Extinguisher Skill
en.q: Have you actually used a fire extinguisher?
opts: Learned in drills never real use
en.exp: Everyone should practice with an extinguisher at least once. Know how before you need it.

flavor: 家中不要存放大量易燃液体

zh.name: 易燃品存放
zh.q: 家中应该如何存放酒精等易燃液体？
opts: 少量存放远离火源密封保存
zh.exp: 易燃液体应少量存放、远离火源和热源、密封保存、放在阴凉通风处。

en.name: Flammable Storage
en.q: How to store flammable liquids at home?
opts: Small amounts away from heat sealed
en.exp: Store small amounts away from heat, sealed, in cool ventilated areas.

flavor: 被困时节省体力很重要

zh.name: 节省体力
zh.q: 被困等待救援时最重要的原则是？
opts: 保持体力减少不必要的活动
zh.exp: 被困时应减少体力消耗，保存体力等待救援。敲击求救优于大声呼喊。

en.name: Conserve Energy
en.q: Most important when trapped waiting for rescue?
en.exp: Minimize energy use when trapped. Save strength. Tapping is better than shouting.

zh.name: 急救顺序
zh.q: 处理外伤的正确顺序是？
zh.exp: 外伤处理顺序：先止血（压迫止血）→消毒（清洁伤口）→包扎→送医。

en.name: First Aid Order
opts: Stop bleeding disinfect bandage seek care
en.exp: Wound care: Stop bleeding → Disinfect → Bandage → Seek medical care.

zh.name: 社区培训
zh.q: 社区组织的防灾培训有必要参加吗？
opts: 很有必要能学到实用技能
zh.exp: 社区防灾培训教你本地化的应急知识，还能认识邻居，灾害时互帮互助。

en.name: Community Training
en.q: Necessary to join community disaster training?
en.exp: Community training teaches local emergency knowledge and helps you know neighbors for mutual aid.

flavor: 高层建筑地震时不要跳楼

zh.name: 不跳楼
zh.q: 高层建筑遇到地震可以跳楼逃生吗？
opts: 绝对不可以比地震本身更危险
zh.exp: 跳楼比地震本身更危险！应躲在桌下或承重墙角，等震动停止后走楼梯撤离。

en.name: Don't Jump
opts: Absolutely not more dangerous than quake
en.exp: Jumping is MORE dangerous than the quake! Hide under desk or corner, use stairs after shaking stops.

flavor: 高层火灾等待救援时用湿毛巾堵门缝

zh.name: 防烟堵门
zh.q: 被困房间无法逃出时如何防烟？
opts: 用湿毛巾湿衣物堵住门缝
zh.exp: 烟气是火灾致死主因。用湿毛巾、湿衣物堵住门缝，到窗边等待救援。

en.name: Smoke Barrier
en.q: How to prevent smoke when trapped in room?
opts: Block door gaps with wet towels
en.exp: Smoke kills most in fires. Block door gaps with wet cloth. Go to window and wait for rescue.

zh.name: 不要游泳
zh.q: 被洪水困住时可以游泳求生吗？
opts: 不可以洪水中有大量杂物极其危险
zh.exp: 洪水不是游泳池！水流湍急且混杂树木、石头等致命杂物，贸然游泳极危险。

en.name: Don't Swim
en.exp: Floodwater is NOT a pool! Swift currents carry deadly debris like trees and rocks. Don't swim.

flavor: 台风天停电不要用蜡烛

zh.name: 停电照明
zh.q: 台风导致停电时用什么照明？
opts: 手电筒不用蜡烛以防失火
zh.exp: 台风天停电应使用手电筒或手机照明，蜡烛在大风中可能引发火灾。

en.name: Power Out Light
opts: Flashlight not candles for fire safety
en.exp: Use flashlights or phone lights during typhoon blackouts. Candles in wind can cause fires.

flavor: 冻伤要用温水慢慢复温

zh.name: 冻伤处理
zh.q: 冻伤的部位应该怎么处理？
zh.exp: 冻伤应用37-40°C温水缓慢复温，绝对不能用热水、雪搓或火烤！

en.name: Frostbite Care
en.exp: Frostbite: rewarm slowly with 37-40°C water. NEVER use hot water, snow, or fire!

flavor: 高温天气给宠物也做好防暑

zh.name: 宠物防暑
zh.q: 高温天气宠物需要特别照顾吗？
opts: 不需要动物自己会适应
需要提供充足饮水和阴凉处
zh.exp: 宠物也会中暑！确保充足饮水、阴凉休息处，避免正午遛狗，绝不能留在车内。

en.name: Pet Heat
en.q: Pets need special care in extreme heat?
opts: Yes shade and fresh water needed
en.exp: Pets get heatstroke too! Provide shade, fresh water, avoid midday walks. NEVER leave in cars.

zh.name: 雾天步行
zh.q: 大雾天步行外出怎样更安全？
opts: 穿反光衣或浅色鲜艳衣物
zh.exp: 雾天能见度低，穿反光衣或浅色衣物能让司机更早发现你。

en.name: Fog Walking
en.q: How to walk safely in fog?
en.exp: Low visibility in fog. Reflective or bright clothes help drivers see you sooner.

flavor: 雷暴天不要在空旷地打球

zh.name: 雷暴户外
zh.q: 看到乌云密布可能有雷暴时应该？
zh.exp: 雷暴前兆明显时应立即进入建筑物躲避，不要在空旷地、树下或水边逗留。

en.name: Pre-Storm
en.exp: When thunderstorms approach, enter a building immediately. Don't linger in open areas, under trees, or near water.

zh.name: 三角巾
zh.q: 三角巾可以用来做什么？
opts: 包扎伤口固定骨折手臂悬吊
zh.exp: 三角巾是万能急救工具，可包扎头部、固定手臂悬吊、包扎胸部等多种用途。

en.name: Triangular Bandage
en.q: What can a triangular bandage do?
opts: Bandage fractures arm sling head wrap
en.exp: Triangular bandages are versatile: head bandage, arm sling, chest wrap, and more.

flavor: 定期检查灭火器是否过期

zh.name: 灭火器检查
zh.q: 灭火器指针在红色区域代表什么？
opts: 压力不足需要充装或更换
zh.exp: 灭火器压力表：绿色正常、红色压力不足需充装、黄色压力过高需检查。

en.name: Extinguisher Check
en.q: Extinguisher needle in red zone means?
en.exp: Pressure gauge: green OK, red low pressure needs refill, yellow over pressure needs checking.

flavor: 灾害时优先保护老人小孩

zh.name: 优先保护
zh.q: 灾害撤离时应该优先帮助谁？
opts: 老人小孩和行动不便者
zh.exp: 撤离时应优先帮助老人、儿童、孕妇和残障人士等弱势群体。

en.name: Priority Evac
en.q: Who to help first during evacuation?
en.exp: Prioritize helping elderly, children, pregnant women, and disabled during evacuation.

zh.name: 血型记录
zh.q: 你知道家人的血型吗？
opts: 知道很重要紧急用血时有用
zh.exp: 记录家人血型、过敏史、慢性病等信息，紧急就医时能帮助医生快速决策。

en.name: Blood Type
en.q: Do you know family members' blood types?
en.exp: Record blood types, allergies, and chronic conditions. Helps doctors make fast decisions in emergencies.

flavor: 不在疏散通道停放自行车

zh.name: 疏散通道
zh.q: 疏散通道可以停放自行车吗？
zh.exp: 疏散通道是生命通道，任何物品都不能占用，包括自行车、鞋柜等。

en.name: Evacuation Path
en.exp: Evacuation corridors are life routes. Nothing should block them — bikes, shoe racks, anything.

flavor: 发送求救信号三短三长三短

zh.name: SOS信号
zh.q: 国际求救信号SOS的敲击节奏是？
zh.exp: SOS敲击信号：三短（···）三长（---）三短（···），国际通用的求救信号。

en.name: SOS Signal
en.q: What is the SOS tapping pattern?
opts: Two short two long two short
Three short three long three short
en.exp: SOS tapping: three short (...), three long (---), three short (...). International distress signal.

flavor: 野外可以收集露水饮用

zh.name: 野外取水
zh.q: 紧急情况下没有饮用水怎么办？
opts: 收集露水或雨水煮沸后饮用
zh.exp: 野外求生可收集露水、雨水，用布料过滤后煮沸饮用。海水绝对不能喝！

en.name: Wild Water
opts: Collect dew or rainwater boil first
en.exp: Survival: collect dew or rainwater, filter through cloth, boil before drinking. NEVER drink seawater!

flavor: 学会心肺复苏可以救亲人

zh.name: CPR价值
zh.q: 学习心肺复苏(CPR)有什么意义？
opts: 关键时刻可以救家人或陌生人的命
zh.exp: 心脏骤停后4分钟内进行CPR，存活率可提高2-3倍！每个人都能学会。

en.name: CPR Value
opts: Can save family or strangers in emergencies
en.exp: CPR within 4 minutes of cardiac arrest doubles or triples survival! Anyone can learn it.

flavor: 学校应定期开展防震演练

zh.name: 学校演练
zh.q: 学校防震演练多久应该举行一次？
zh.exp: 学校应每学期至少开展一次防震演练，让学生熟悉逃生路线和避难动作。

en.name: School Drill
en.q: How often should schools hold earthquake drills?
en.exp: Schools should hold earthquake drills at least once per semester so students know routes and positions.

flavor: 拨打119要说清地址和火势

zh.name: 报火警
zh.q: 拨打119火警电话要说什么？
opts: 详细地址起火位置火势大小有无被困人员
zh.exp: 报火警要说清：1.详细地址 2.起火位置 3.火势大小 4.有无被困人员 5.自己的联系方式。

en.name: Call 119
en.q: What to say when calling fire dept?
opts: Address fire location size anyone trapped
en.exp: Tell dispatchers: 1.Address 2.Fire location 3.Size 4.Anyone trapped 5.Your contact number.

flavor: 城市建设要考虑排洪能力

zh.name: 城市排水
zh.q: 城市内涝频繁的主要原因之一是？
opts: 排水系统老旧不适应极端降雨
zh.exp: 城市化导致地面硬化、排水系统老化，极端暴雨时排水能力不足造成内涝。

en.name: Urban Flooding
en.q: Main cause of frequent urban flooding?
opts: Old drainage can't handle extreme rain
en.exp: Urbanization hardens ground surfaces. Aging drainage can't handle extreme rainfall, causing flooding.

zh.name: 防震演练
zh.q: 学校防震演练的正确做法是？
zh.exp: 地震时先躲在坚固家具下，等主震过后再有序撤离，不要盲目奔跑。

en.name: Earthquake Drill
en.q: What is the correct action during a school earthquake drill?
en.exp: During an earthquake, hide under sturdy furniture first, then evacuate in order after the main shock.

zh.name: 生命三角辟谣
zh.q: 关于'生命三角'避震法，正确的说法是？
zh.exp: 生命三角理论已被辟谣，躲在坚固家具下或承重墙角更安全。

en.name: Triangle of Life Myth
en.q: What is the correct view on the 'Triangle of Life' method?
en.exp: The Triangle of Life theory has been debunked. Hiding under sturdy furniture or in wall corners is safer.

zh.name: 浓烟逃生
zh.q: 火灾中浓烟致死的主要原因是？
zh.exp: 浓烟中含有有毒气体和大量烟尘，会导致中毒、窒息和灼伤，是火灾致死的首要原因。

en.name: Smoke Escape
en.q: What is the main cause of death from smoke in fires?
en.exp: Smoke contains toxic gases and particles that cause poisoning, suffocation, and burns — the leading cause of fire deaths.

zh.name: 电动车安全
zh.q: 电动车充电最安全的方式是？
zh.exp: 电动车应在室外专用充电桩充电，严禁在楼道、室内或飞线充电，防止电池起火。

en.name: E-bike Safety
en.q: What is the safest way to charge an e-bike?
en.exp: E-bikes should be charged at outdoor dedicated stations. Never charge in hallways, indoors, or with extension cords.

zh.name: 内涝避险
zh.q: 城市内涝时，最危险的区域是？
zh.exp: 地下车库和隧道是内涝时最危险的区域，水流会快速涌入且难以逃生。

en.name: Urban Flooding
en.q: What is the most dangerous area during urban flooding?
en.exp: Underground garages and tunnels are the most dangerous during urban flooding as water rushes in quickly.

zh.name: 暴雨预警
zh.q: 红色暴雨预警信号代表什么？
zh.exp: 红色暴雨预警是最高级别，表示3小时内降雨量将达100毫米以上，需立即采取防御措施。

en.name: Rainstorm Warning
en.q: What does a Red Rainstorm Warning mean?
en.exp: Red Rainstorm Warning is the highest level, meaning 100mm+ rainfall expected in 3 hours.

zh.name: 台风防护
zh.q: 台风来临时，以下哪项防护措施是错误的？
zh.exp: 台风天切勿站在窗户边，玻璃可能被风吹碎造成伤害。

en.name: Typhoon Protection
en.q: Which typhoon protection measure is WRONG?
en.exp: Never stand by windows during a typhoon — glass may shatter from wind force.

zh.name: 台风命名
zh.q: 台风的名字是由谁命名的？
zh.exp: 台风名字由世界气象组织台风委员会统一命名，按顺序循环使用。

en.name: Typhoon Naming
en.exp: Typhoons are named by the WMO Typhoon Committee using a rotating list.

zh.name: 龙卷风避险
zh.q: 龙卷风来临时，最安全的躲避位置是？
zh.exp: 龙卷风来临时应躲进地下室或建筑内部最小的房间（如卫生间），远离窗户。

en.name: Tornado Shelter
en.exp: During a tornado, hide in a basement or smallest interior room (like a bathroom), away from windows.

zh.name: 龙卷风等级
zh.q: EF5级龙卷风的最大风速可达多少？
zh.exp: EF5级龙卷风最大风速超过320公里/小时，是最强等级，可摧毁坚固建筑。

en.name: Tornado Scale
en.q: Maximum wind speed of EF5 tornado?
en.exp: EF5 tornadoes have maximum winds over 320 km/h, the strongest category, capable of destroying reinforced buildings.

zh.name: 海啸逃生
zh.q: 海啸来临时，正确的逃生方向是？
opts: 向高处或内陆方向撤离
zh.exp: 海啸来临时应立即向高处（海拔30米以上）或内陆方向撤离，绝不能向海边跑。

en.name: Tsunami Escape
opts: Move to higher ground or inland
en.exp: During a tsunami, immediately move to higher ground (30m+ elevation) or inland. Never run toward the sea.

zh.name: 海啸预警
zh.q: 海啸预警中，黄色预警代表什么？
zh.exp: 黄色预警表示海啸可能影响沿海地区，需要做好防御准备。

en.name: Tsunami Alert
en.q: What does a Yellow Tsunami Warning mean?
en.exp: Yellow Warning means a tsunami may affect coastal areas; prepare defenses.

zh.name: 滑坡前兆
zh.q: 以下哪个不是滑坡的前兆？
zh.exp: 动物异常行为（如惊恐逃窜）是滑坡前兆之一，正常活动不是。

en.name: Landslide Signs
en.q: Which is NOT a landslide precursor?
en.exp: Abnormal animal behavior (panic fleeing) is a landslide precursor; normal activity is not.

zh.name: 泥石流逃生
zh.q: 遭遇泥石流时，正确的逃生方向是？
opts: 垂直于泥石流方向跑向高处
zh.exp: 泥石流速度极快，应垂直于泥石流方向向两侧高处跑，切勿顺流或逆流跑。

en.name: Mudslide Escape
en.exp: Mudslides are extremely fast. Run perpendicular to the flow toward higher ground on either side.

zh.name: 野火逃生
zh.q: 山火逼近时，以下哪种做法最危险？
zh.exp: 躲在茂密树林中最危险，树木会燃烧，应向已烧过的区域或空旷地转移。

en.name: Wildfire Escape
en.q: Most dangerous action when wildfire approaches?
en.exp: Hiding in dense forest is most dangerous — trees will burn. Move to burned areas or open ground.

zh.name: 野外防火
zh.q: 在森林中以下哪种行为最容易引发山火？
zh.exp: 乱扔烟头是引发森林火灾的主要人为原因之一。

en.name: Forest Fire Prevention
en.q: Which forest behavior most easily causes wildfire?
en.exp: Discarded cigarette butts are a leading human cause of forest fires.

zh.name: 暴风雪避险
zh.q: 暴风雪中被困车内时，正确的做法是？
opts: 间歇性启动发动机取暖
zh.exp: 被困车内应间歇性启动发动机取暖（留缝隙通风防一氧化碳中毒），不要贸然下车。

en.name: Blizzard Shelter
en.q: Correct action when trapped in car during blizzard?
en.exp: Start the engine periodically for heat (leave gap for ventilation to prevent CO poisoning). Don't leave the car.

zh.name: 雪天出行
zh.q: 雪天步行外出最安全的鞋子是？
zh.exp: 雪天应穿平底防滑鞋，增大摩擦力，减少滑倒风险。

en.name: Snow Walking
en.q: Safest shoes for walking on snow?
en.exp: Wear flat non-slip shoes in snow for better grip and reduced fall risk.

zh.name: 沙尘暴防护
zh.q: 沙尘暴天气外出时，最重要的防护措施是？
zh.exp: 沙尘暴中应佩戴口罩（防PM10）和护目镜（保护眼睛），雨具对沙尘无效。

en.name: Sandstorm Protection
en.exp: During sandstorms, wear a mask (against PM10) and goggles (eye protection). Rain gear doesn't block sand.

zh.name: 沙尘暴居家
zh.q: 沙尘暴天气在家应该怎么做？
opts: 关好门窗并用湿毛巾封缝
zh.exp: 沙尘暴天应关好门窗，用湿毛巾封住缝隙，防止沙尘进入室内。

en.name: Sandstorm Home
en.q: What to do at home during sandstorm?
opts: Close windows, seal with wet towel
en.exp: During sandstorms, close all windows and seal gaps with wet towels to keep sand out.

zh.name: 燃气泄漏禁忌
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏后，绝对不能做的事情是？
zh.exp: 燃气泄漏时开关电灯可能产生电火花引发爆炸，应先关闭阀门、开窗通风、撤离后再报警。

en.name: Gas Leak Taboo
en.q: What must you NEVER do during a gas leak?
en.exp: Switching lights during a gas leak can create sparks causing explosion. Close valve, ventilate, evacuate, then call for help.

zh.name: 燃气检查
zh.q: 检查燃气泄漏最简单的方法是？
opts: 用肥皂水涂抹接头处观察气泡
zh.exp: 用肥皂水涂抹燃气管道接头，如有气泡冒出说明漏气，切勿用明火检测。

en.name: Gas Leak Check
en.q: Simplest way to check for gas leaks?
opts: Apply soapy water to joints and watch for bubbles
en.exp: Apply soapy water to gas pipe joints — bubbles indicate a leak. Never use open flame to test.

zh.name: 电梯被困
zh.q: 被困电梯时，正确的做法是？
opts: 按紧急呼叫按钮等待救援
zh.exp: 被困电梯应按下紧急呼叫按钮，保持冷静等待专业救援，切勿扒门或爬出。

en.name: Elevator Trapped
en.q: Correct action when trapped in elevator?
en.exp: When trapped, press the emergency button, stay calm and wait for professional rescue. Never force doors or climb out.

zh.name: 电梯使用
zh.q: 以下哪种情况不应乘坐电梯？
zh.exp: 火灾时严禁乘坐电梯，应走楼梯逃生，电梯可能断电困人。

en.name: Elevator Safety
en.q: When should you NOT use an elevator?
en.exp: Never use elevators during fires — they may lose power and trap you. Use stairs instead.

zh.name: 地震等级
zh.q: 里氏震级每增加1级，能量释放增加约多少倍？
zh.exp: 里氏震级每增加1级，能量释放约增加32倍；增加2级约1000倍。

en.name: Earthquake Magnitude
en.q: Energy increase per 1-point rise on Richter scale?
en.exp: Each 1-point increase on the Richter scale releases about 32 times more energy; 2 points = ~1000x.

zh.name: 灭火器使用
zh.q: 使用灭火器的正确步骤口诀是？
opts: 一提二拔三对准四喷射
zh.exp: 灭火器使用口诀：一提（提起灭火器）、二拔（拔出保险销）、三对准（对准火焰根部）、四喷射。

en.name: Fire Extinguisher
en.q: Correct steps to use a fire extinguisher?
en.exp: PASS method: Pull pin, Aim at base, Squeeze handle, Sweep side to side.

zh.name: 洪水防疫
zh.q: 洪水退去后最容易爆发什么？
zh.exp: 洪水退去后水源被污染，容易爆发霍乱、痢疾等传染病疫情，需注意饮水安全和环境消毒。

en.name: Flood Disease
en.q: What is most likely after floods recede?
en.exp: After floods, contaminated water sources can cause cholera, dysentery, etc. Ensure safe drinking water and disinfection.

zh.name: 台风眼
zh.q: 台风眼区域的天气特征是？
zh.exp: 台风眼区域反而风平浪静、天空晴朗，但这是暂时的，眼壁过后狂风会再次袭来。

en.name: Typhoon Eye
en.exp: The typhoon eye is surprisingly calm and clear, but the eye wall's violent winds return quickly.

zh.name: 计划烧除
zh.q: 什么是「计划烧除」？
opts: 有控制地烧除林下可燃物以减少大火风险
zh.exp: 计划烧除是一种科学的林火管理方法，通过有控制地烧除林下可燃物来降低特大火灾风险。

en.name: Prescribed Burn
opts: Controlled burning to reduce fuel and wildfire risk
en.exp: Prescribed burns are controlled fires that reduce undergrowth fuel, lowering the risk of catastrophic wildfires.

zh.name: 龙卷风分布
zh.q: 世界上龙卷风发生最多的国家是？
zh.exp: 美国是世界上龙卷风发生最多的国家，尤其是中部平原地区，被称为'龙卷风走廊'。

en.name: Tornado Distribution
en.q: Which country has the most tornadoes?
en.exp: The US has the most tornadoes globally, especially in the central plains known as 'Tornado Alley'.

zh.name: 地震知识1
zh.q: 地震时躲在哪个位置最安全？
zh.exp: 躲在坚固的桌子下面可以防止被坠落物砸伤，是最安全的避震位置。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 1
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识2
zh.q: 地震后发现煤气泄漏，应该？
zh.exp: 发现煤气泄漏应立即关闭阀门，切断气源是最关键的措施。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 2
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识3
zh.q: 地震预警信号中，黄色代表什么？
zh.exp: 地震预警中黄色表示预警级别较高，需要做好防范准备。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 3
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识4
zh.q: 地震时如果在高楼，应该？
zh.exp: 承重墙角结构坚固，是高楼避震的最佳位置。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 4
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识5
zh.q: 地震发生时，正确的避震姿势是？
zh.exp: 蹲下、掩护、抓牢是国际通用的避震三步骤。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 5
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识6
zh.q: 地震后被埋压，应该？
zh.exp: 保存体力等待救援是被埋压后最明智的做法。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 6
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识7
zh.q: 地震预警倒计时的主要作用是？
zh.exp: 倒计时为人们提供宝贵的几秒到几十秒避险时间。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 7
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识8
zh.q: 地震时，以下哪个地方最危险？
zh.exp: 窗户旁边的玻璃可能破碎飞溅，造成严重伤害。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 8
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识9
zh.q: 地震后检查房屋时，应该？
zh.exp: 从外部开始检查可以评估整体结构安全性。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 9
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 地震知识10
zh.q: 地震时如果在开车，应该？
zh.exp: 开阔地带远离建筑物和桥梁，是最安全的停车位置。

en.name: Earthquake Knowledge 10
en.exp: Learn about earthquake safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识1
zh.q: 发现火灾后，应该先做什么？
zh.exp: 按下火灾报警器可以及时通知所有人员疏散。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 1
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识2
zh.q: 逃生时应该用什么捂住口鼻？
zh.exp: 湿毛巾可以过滤烟雾中的有害颗粒，保护呼吸道。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 2
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识3
zh.q: 火灾逃生时应该走哪个方向？
zh.exp: 烟雾上升，贴近地面的空气相对清洁，能见度也更高。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 3
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识4
zh.q: 身上着火时应该怎么做？
zh.exp: 就地打滚可以隔绝空气，有效扑灭身上的火焰。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 4
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识5
zh.q: 火灾报警器应该安装在？
zh.exp: 每个房间都应安装火灾报警器，确保全方位监控。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 5
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识6
zh.q: 发现燃气泄漏时，应该？
zh.exp: 立即关闭燃气阀门切断气源是最安全的做法。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 6
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识7
zh.q: 高层建筑火灾时，应该？
zh.exp: 烟雾向上蔓延，向下逃生可以更快到达安全区域。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 7
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识8
zh.q: 灭火器应该对准火源的哪个部位？
zh.exp: 对准火焰根部喷射才能有效隔绝氧气，扑灭火焰。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 8
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识9
zh.q: 火灾逃生时遇到浓烟，应该？
zh.exp: 浓烟中能见度极低且含有有毒气体，退回房间更安全。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 9
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 火灾知识10
zh.q: 家庭应该准备哪些消防器材？
zh.exp: 灭火器、烟感器和逃生绳是家庭消防的基本配置。

en.name: Fire Knowledge 10
en.exp: Learn about fire safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识1
zh.q: 洪水来临时，应该往哪里转移？
zh.exp: 洪水会向低处汇聚，转移到高处可以避免被淹。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 1
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识2
zh.q: 洪水期间，以下哪种食物不能吃？
zh.exp: 被洪水浸泡过的食物可能被污染，绝对不能食用。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 2
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识3
zh.q: 洪水来临时，如果在车内应该？
zh.exp: 车辆可能被洪水冲走或淹没，立即弃车逃生更安全。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 3
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识4
zh.q: 洪水期间应该喝什么样的水？
zh.exp: 瓶装水或烧开的水可以避免饮用被污染的水源。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 4
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识5
zh.q: 洪水后返回家园，应该先？
zh.exp: 先检查房屋结构是否安全，避免发生二次事故。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 5
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识6
zh.q: 洪水预警中，红色代表什么？
zh.exp: 红色预警是最高级别的洪水预警，需要立即采取行动。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 6
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识7
zh.q: 洪水期间，以下哪个做法正确？
zh.exp: 洪水期间电线可能漏电，远离电力设施是最安全的。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 7
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识8
zh.q: 遇到山洪暴发，应该？
zh.exp: 向两侧山坡跑可以快速离开洪水路径。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 8
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识9
zh.q: 洪水期间，如何保护重要文件？
zh.exp: 防水袋可以保护文件不被水浸湿，带到高处更安全。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 9
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 洪水知识10
zh.q: 洪水后需要特别注意什么？
zh.exp: 洪水后环境容易滋生细菌，预防传染病是首要任务。

en.name: Flood Knowledge 10
en.exp: Learn about flood safety measures.

zh.name: 台风知识1
zh.q: 台风来临时，应该提前准备什么？
zh.exp: 储备食物和饮用水是应对台风的基础准备。

en.name: Typhoon Knowledge 1
en.exp: Learn about typhoon safety measures.

zh.name: 台风知识2
zh.q: 台风期间，以下哪个地方最安全？
zh.exp: 坚固的室内可以提供最好的保护，避免被风吹飞的物体击中。

en.name: Typhoon Knowledge 2
en.exp: Learn about typhoon safety measures.

zh.name: 台风知识3
zh.q: 台风预警中，几级风力需要停工停课？
zh.exp: 10级以上台风会造成严重破坏，需要停工停课。

en.name: Typhoon Knowledge 3
en.exp: Learn about typhoon safety measures.

zh.name: 台风知识4
zh.q: 台风期间，如果在室外应该？
zh.exp: 寻找坚固掩体可以避免被强风和飞散物伤害。

en.name: Typhoon Knowledge 4
